penalties.detail: 1% of declaration weight has no edges

layers.name: Entry
layers.summary_zh: gt 及代理二进制的 main 入口
layers.summary_en: main entry points for the gt and proxy binaries

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: gt-proxy-server 二进制的入口,合并配置文件与命令行参数、加载/生成 mTLS CA,并启动让沙箱容器经授权 HTTP 端点调用 gt/bd 和访问 git 仓库的代理服务器。
classes.description_en: Entry point of the gt-proxy-server binary that merges config-file and CLI flags, loads or generates the mTLS CA, and starts the host-side proxy server letting sandboxed containers invoke gt/bd and reach git repos over authorized HTTP endpoints.

classes.name: buildAllowedSubcmds
classes.description_zh: 将配置文件中的 map[command]→subcommands 序列化回分号分隔的 "cmd:sub1,sub2" 允许列表格式,供代理服务器的子命令白名单解析使用。
classes.description_en: Serializes the config file's map[command]→subcommands back into the semicolon-separated "cmd:sub1,sub2" allowlist format consumed by the proxy server's subcommand whitelist parser.

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: gt-proxy-client 二进制(在容器中同时充当 gt 与 bd)的入口,当代理环境变量齐备时经 mTLS 把参数转发给代理服务器并回传响应,否则透明 exec 真实二进制。
classes.description_en: Entry point of the gt-proxy-client binary (installed in containers as both gt and bd) that, when the proxy env vars are all set, forwards argv to the proxy server over mTLS and relays the response, otherwise transparently execs the real binary.

classes.name: execReal
classes.description_zh: 在非沙箱模式下用真实 gt/bd 二进制(GT_REAL_BIN 或默认 /usr/local/bin/gt.real)替换当前进程,使代理客户端在无代理配置时透明回退。
classes.description_en: Replaces the current process with the real gt/bd binary (GT_REAL_BIN or the default /usr/local/bin/gt.real), letting the proxy client fall back transparently when no proxy is configured.

classes.name: parseAllowedSubcmds
classes.description_zh: 把 "gt:prime,hook;bd:create,close" 形式的允许列表字符串解析为 command→subcommand 集合的 map,构成代理服务器对沙箱命令的授权策略。
classes.description_en: Parses an allowlist string of the form "gt:prime,hook;bd:create,close" into a command→subcommand-set map that forms the proxy server's authorization policy for sandboxed commands.

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: npm 包的 Node 启动垫片入口,定位随包分发的平台原生 gt 二进制、透传所有命令行参数与环境并代理其退出码,使 gt 可经 npm 安装运行。
classes.description_en: Entry of the npm package's Node launcher shim that locates the packaged platform-native gt binary, passes through all CLI args and environment, and proxies its exit code so gt can be installed and run via npm.

classes.name: toolNameFromArg0
classes.description_zh: 从 argv[0] 的二进制路径取出工具名(gt 或 bd),让代理客户端据调用名告知服务器自己所代表的工具。
classes.description_en: Extracts the tool name (gt or bd) from the argv[0] binary path so the proxy client can tell the server which tool it is invoked as.

classes.name: discoverAllowedSubcmds
classes.description_zh: 通过执行 "gt proxy-subcmds" 自动发现允许的子命令列表,失败或为空时回退到内置默认白名单,作为代理服务器子命令授权的默认来源。
classes.description_en: Auto-discovers the allowed subcommand list by running "gt proxy-subcmds", falling back to the built-in default whitelist on failure or empty output, as the default source for the proxy server's subcommand authorization.

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: gt 主 CLI 二进制的入口,委托 internal/cmd.Execute() 运行 Gas Town 多智能体工作区管理命令并以其退出码结束。
classes.description_en: Entry point of the main gt CLI binary that delegates to internal/cmd.Execute() to run Gas Town's multi-agent workspace management commands and exits with its return code.

classes.name: execRequest
classes.description_zh: 代理客户端发往服务器 /v1/exec 端点的请求负载结构,携带要在主机上代为执行的 argv 命令行。
classes.description_en: Request payload struct sent by the proxy client to the server's /v1/exec endpoint, carrying the argv command line to be executed on the host.

classes.name: execResponse
classes.description_zh: 代理服务器返回给客户端的执行结果结构,封装被代理命令的 stdout、stderr 与退出码,供客户端原样回放给容器。
classes.description_en: Execution-result struct returned by the proxy server to the client, wrapping the proxied command's stdout, stderr, and exit code for the client to replay back inside the container.

layers.name: CLI Commands
layers.summary_zh: cobra 子命令处理器与补全/建议

classes.name: CombinedOutput
classes.description_zh: 运行所构建的 bd 子进程命令并返回合并后的 stdout+stderr,便于把底层 bd 输出嵌入错误信息中。
classes.description_en: Runs the built bd subprocess and returns combined stdout+stderr, used to embed underlying bd output in error messages.

classes.name: InstantiateFormulaOnBead
classes.signature: func InstantiateFormulaOnBead(ctx context.Context, formulaName, beadID, title, hookWorkDir, townRoot string, skipCook bool, extraVars []string) (_ *FormulaOnBeadResult, retErr error)
classes.description_zh: 把一个 formula 烹制并实例化为 wisp、绑定到目标 bead,实现 gt sling/convoy 派工时自动给 bead 附加工作流(如 mol-polecat-work)。
classes.description_en: Cooks and instantiates a formula into a wisp bonded to a target bead, auto-attaching a workflow (e.g. mol-polecat-work) to a bead during sling/convoy dispatch.

classes.name: IsRigParkedOrDocked
classes.description_zh: 在派工前统一判定某个 rig 是否处于 parked 或 docked 状态,是 sling/convoy 各路径检查 rig 可用性的唯一入口。
classes.description_en: Single entry point that checks whether a rig is parked or docked before dispatch, gating sling/convoy availability.

classes.name: GetRoleWithContext
classes.description_zh: 给定 cwd 与 town root,综合 GT_ROLE 环境变量与目录路径推断出当前 agent 的角色(mayor/witness/polecat 等)及其归属 rig。
classes.description_en: Resolves the current agent's role (mayor/witness/polecat etc.) and owning rig from explicit cwd and town root, combining GT_ROLE env vars with directory detection.

classes.name: Build
classes.description_zh: 把已配置好环境与工作目录的 bdCmd 构建器物化为可执行的 exec.Cmd,供调用方进一步定制后执行。
classes.description_en: Materializes the configured bdCmd builder into an executable exec.Cmd that callers can further customize before running.

classes.name: BdCmd
classes.description_zh: 创建 bd CLI 调用的链式构建器,是 gt 各子命令委托底层 bd(beads)数据库操作的统一入口。
classes.description_en: Creates the fluent builder for bd CLI invocations, the shared entry point through which gt subcommands delegate to the bd (beads) database.

classes.name: IsRigName
classes.description_zh: 判定 sling 目标字符串是否为一个有效的 rig 名称(而非角色或路径),用于将 gt sling 的目标路由到生成 polecat 的分支。
classes.description_en: Determines whether a sling target string is a valid rig name (not a role or path), routing gt sling to the polecat-spawn branch.

classes.name: SpawnPolecatForSling
classes.signature: func SpawnPolecatForSling(rigName string, opts SlingSpawnOptions) (*SpawnedPolecatInfo, error)
classes.description_zh: 为 gt sling 在指定 rig 中创建并准备一个全新 polecat 工作单元(含健康检查、准入控制、复用空闲实例与重生熔断),返回供挂接 bead 与启动会话的信息。
classes.description_en: Spawns and prepares a fresh polecat worker in a rig for gt sling — with Dolt health/admission checks, idle-polecat reuse and respawn circuit-breaking — returning info for bead hookup and session start.

classes.name: StripBeadsDir
classes.description_zh: 从 bd 命令环境中剔除继承自父进程的 BEADS_DIR,避免错误地覆盖由工作目录解析出的目标数据库。
classes.description_en: Strips an inherited BEADS_DIR from the bd command's environment so it cannot override the database resolved from the working directory.

classes.name: GetRole
classes.description_zh: 无参数检测当前 agent 的角色,自动定位 Gas Town workspace 并优先读取 GT_ROLE、回退到 cwd,是角色检测的规范入口。
classes.description_en: Canonical zero-arg role detection: locates the Gas Town workspace and resolves the current agent's role from GT_ROLE first, falling back to cwd.

classes.name: WithAutoCommit
classes.description_zh: 为 bd 命令开启 BD_DOLT_AUTO_COMMIT=on,使一连串相互依赖的 bd 调用能即时看到彼此的写入。
classes.description_en: Enables BD_DOLT_AUTO_COMMIT=on for the bd command so a sequence of dependent bd calls each sees the previous call's writes.

classes.name: IsRigParked
classes.description_zh: 判定某个 rig 是否被 parked(暂停派工),先查 ephemeral 的 wisp 层再回退到持久化的 bead 标签。
classes.description_en: Checks whether a rig is parked (paused), consulting the ephemeral wisp layer first then falling back to the persistent rig-bead label.

classes.name: CookFormula
classes.signature: func CookFormula(formulaName, workDir, townRoot string) error
classes.description_zh: 烹制一个 formula 以确保其 proto 存在(批处理派工前一次性 cook),并在 bd 找不到磁盘上的 formula 时回退到内嵌副本。
classes.description_en: Cooks a formula to ensure its proto exists (a one-time pre-step for batch dispatch), falling back to the embedded formula when bd can't find it on disk.

classes.name: DispatchToDog
classes.signature: func DispatchToDog(dogName string, opts DogDispatchOptions) (*DogDispatchInfo, error)
classes.description_zh: 为 deacon 的 dog 池派发工作:按名查找或自动扩容创建一个 dog、标记其工作内容并(可选延迟)启动其会话,支撑 gt sling 到 dog 目标。
classes.description_en: Dispatches work to deacon's dog pool — finds or auto-creates a dog, marks its assigned work, and (optionally deferred) starts its session — backing gt sling to dog targets.

classes.name: Stderr
classes.description_zh: 为 bd 命令设置 stderr 输出目标,默认沿用 os.Stderr。
classes.description_en: Sets the stderr writer for the bd command, defaulting to os.Stderr.

classes.name: InitGitForHarness
classes.signature: func InitGitForHarness(hqRoot string, github string, private bool) error
classes.description_zh: 为 Gas Town HQ 初始化 git(创建 .gitignore、初始化仓库、安装分支保护钩子、可选创建 GitHub 仓库),供 gt git-init 与 gt install --git 共用。
classes.description_en: Initializes git for a Gas Town HQ (gitignore, repo init, branch-protection hook, optional GitHub repo creation), shared by gt git-init and gt install --git.

classes.name: StartSession
classes.description_zh: 在 bead/molecule 挂接完成后启动 polecat 的 tmux 会话,解析账号、启动 agent runtime、等待就绪并更新 polecat 状态,返回其 pane。
classes.description_en: Starts a spawned polecat's tmux session after bead/molecule hookup — resolving the account, launching the agent runtime, waiting for readiness and updating polecat state — returning its pane.

classes.name: LogEventWithRoot
classes.signature: func LogEventWithRoot(townRoot string, eventType townlog.EventType, agent, context string) error
classes.description_zh: 在已知 town root 时向 town.log 记录一条事件(spawn/wake/handoff 等),是各类便捷日志函数的底层写入入口。
classes.description_en: Logs an event (spawn/wake/handoff etc.) to town.log when the town root is already known, the underlying write path for the convenience log helpers.

classes.name: NewSilentExit
classes.description_zh: 构造一个 SilentExitError,让命令以指定退出码静默退出而不打印错误(用于脚本化场景下用退出码传达状态)。
classes.description_en: Constructs a SilentExitError so a command exits with a specific code without printing an error, conveying status via exit code for scripting.

classes.name: LoadRegistry
classes.description_zh: 从 town 的 hooks/registry.toml 加载并解析钩子注册表,供 gt hooks registry 列出已注册的钩子。
classes.description_en: Loads and parses the hook registry from the town's hooks/registry.toml, backing gt hooks registry's listing of registered hooks.

classes.name: AllowStale
classes.description_zh: 请求 bd 的 stale-read 旁路;当安装的 bd 版本不支持该标志时静默省略,为调用方提供统一的版本兼容路径。
classes.description_en: Requests bd's stale-read bypass, silently omitting the flag on bd versions that don't support it to give callers one version-compatible path.

classes.name: InstallBranchProtection
classes.description_zh: 向 town root 的 git post-checkout 钩子注入分支保护脚本,自动把误切到非 main 的 town root 还原回 main,防止破坏 gt 命令。
classes.description_en: Injects a branch-protection script into the town root's git post-checkout hook that auto-reverts accidental non-main checkouts back to main, preventing broken gt commands.

classes.name: TriggerSynthesisIfReady
classes.description_zh: 在 convoy 某条 leg 完成时检查全部 leg 是否就绪,若就绪则收集各 leg 产出、创建 synthesis bead 并将其 sling 给目标 rig,驱动 convoy 的汇总合成阶段。
classes.description_en: On convoy leg completion, checks whether all legs are ready and, if so, gathers leg outputs, creates a synthesis bead and slings it to the target rig, driving the convoy's synthesis stage.

classes.name: WithRouting
classes.description_zh: 让 bd 命令依赖前缀路由选择目标数据库:剥离继承的 bd 目标选择变量且不固定 BEADS_DIR,仅以工作目录设定 cwd。
classes.description_en: Lets the bd command rely on prefix routing to pick its target database — stripping inherited bd target selectors and not pinning BEADS_DIR, only setting cwd from the directory.

classes.name: IsDogTarget
classes.signature: func IsDogTarget(target string) (dogName string, isDog bool)
classes.description_zh: 解析 sling 目标是否为 dog 目标(deacon/dogs、dog: 等模式),区分指定具名 dog 与向空闲池派发。
classes.description_en: Parses whether a sling target is a dog target (deacon/dogs, dog: patterns), distinguishing a named dog from pool dispatch to any idle dog.

classes.name: ReadPersistedSessionID
classes.description_zh: 读取先前持久化的 agent 会话 ID(先查 cwd 再查 town root),供 gt prime 等在会话启动时恢复上下文。
classes.description_en: Reads a previously persisted agent session ID (checking cwd then town root), used to restore context at session start (e.g. gt prime).

classes.name: WithBeadsDir
classes.description_zh: 为 bd 命令显式固定 BEADS_DIR,防止继承的环境变量让 bd 写错数据库(如 HQ 与 rig 混淆)。
classes.description_en: Pins BEADS_DIR explicitly for the bd command so an inherited value can't make bd write to the wrong database (e.g. HQ vs rig).

classes.name: IsRigDocked
classes.signature: func IsRigDocked(townRoot, rigName, prefix string) bool
classes.description_zh: 通过 rig 身份 bead 上的 status:docked 标签判定某个 rig 是否被 docked(全局停机),供守护进程等复用。
classes.description_en: Checks whether a rig is docked (globally shut down) via the status:docked label on its rig-identity bead, exported for the daemon to reuse.

classes.name: WithGTRoot
classes.description_zh: 为 bd 命令设置 GT_ROOT 环境变量,使 bd 能找到 town 级的 formula 与配置。
classes.description_en: Sets GT_ROOT in the bd command's environment so bd can locate town-level formulas and configuration.

classes.name: ClassifySchemaChange
classes.description_zh: 比较本地与上游的 beads schema 版本号,判定为不变/向后兼容的小改/需显式升级的破坏性大改,支撑 workload 的 schema 演进决策。
classes.description_en: Compares local vs upstream beads schema versions and classifies the change as unchanged, backwards-compatible minor, or breaking major, driving workload schema-evolution decisions.

classes.name: ActorString
classes.description_zh: 将检测到的角色格式化为 beads 归属(created_by)用的 actor 标识字符串,如 "mayor"、"gastown/witness"、"gastown/polecats/Toast"。
classes.description_en: Formats a detected role into the actor identity string used for beads attribution (created_by), e.g. "mayor", "gastown/witness", "gastown/polecats/Toast".

classes.name: IsBranchProtectionInstalled
classes.description_zh: 检测 town root 的 git post-checkout 钩子中是否已安装分支保护脚本。
classes.description_en: Checks whether the branch-protection script is already installed in the town root's git post-checkout hook.

classes.name: CheckSynthesisReady
classes.description_zh: 检查某个 convoy 是否已具备合成条件,即其所有被跟踪的 leg 是否都已完成。
classes.description_en: Checks whether a convoy is ready for synthesis, i.e. whether all of its tracked legs have completed.

classes.name: InstallPreCheckoutHook
classes.description_zh: 安装 town root 的分支保护钩子的兼容别名(git 不支持 pre-checkout,实际委托给 post-checkout 的 InstallBranchProtection)。
classes.description_en: Backwards-compatible alias for installing town-root branch protection (git lacks pre-checkout, so it delegates to InstallBranchProtection on post-checkout).

classes.name: LogHandoff
classes.signature: func LogHandoff(townRoot, agent, context string) error
classes.description_zh: 记录一条 handoff(交接)事件到 town.log,标记 agent 之间的工作移交。
classes.description_en: Logs a handoff event to town.log, marking a work handoff between agents.

classes.name: LogHandoffNoPersist
classes.signature: func LogHandoffNoPersist(townRoot, agent, context string, persistErr error) error
classes.description_zh: 记录一条 Dolt 持久化失败的 handoff,在 town.log 中留下独特标记,以便崩溃恢复识别已尝试但未持久化的交接。
classes.description_en: Logs a handoff whose Dolt persistence failed, leaving a distinct town.log marker so crash recovery can identify handoffs attempted but never persisted.

classes.name: StartDelayedSession
classes.description_zh: 在 bead 准备完成后才启动此前延迟派发的 dog 会话,仅在 dispatch 时请求了延迟启动的情况下调用。
classes.description_en: Starts a previously deferred dog session after bead setup is complete, called only when session start was delayed during dispatch.

classes.name: GetRigLED
classes.signature: func GetRigLED(hasWitness, hasRefinery bool, opState string) string
classes.description_zh: 根据 rig 的会话与运行状态(witness/refinery 是否在跑、是否 parked/docked)返回统一的 LED 指示符,供 gt rig list 与状态栏一致展示。
classes.description_en: Returns a unified LED indicator for a rig from its session and operational state (witness/refinery running, parked/docked), shared by gt rig list and the statusline.

classes.name: Run
classes.description_zh: 构建并执行 bd 命令、带超时控制并包装超时错误,是 BdCmd 构建器执行只关心成败的调用的便捷方法。
classes.description_en: Builds and runs the bd command with a timeout and timeout-error wrapping, the convenience method for executing a BdCmd builder when only success/failure matters.

classes.name: Output
classes.description_zh: 构建并执行 bd 命令、带超时控制并捕获其 stdout 返回,是 BdCmd 构建器读取命令输出的便捷方法。
classes.description_en: Builds and runs the bd command with a timeout, capturing and returning its stdout — the convenience method for reading a BdCmd builder's output.

classes.name: LogNudge
classes.signature: func LogNudge(townRoot, agent, message string) error

classes.name: LogDone
classes.signature: func LogDone(townRoot, agent, issueID string) error

classes.name: ParseSchemaVersion
classes.signature: func ParseSchemaVersion(s string) (major, minor int, err error)

classes.name: LogEvent
classes.signature: func LogEvent(eventType townlog.EventType, agent, context string) error

classes.name: LogSpawn
classes.signature: func LogSpawn(townRoot, agent, issueID string) error

classes.name: LogWake
classes.signature: func LogWake(townRoot, agent, context string) error

classes.name: LogCrash
classes.signature: func LogCrash(townRoot, agent, reason string) error

classes.name: LogKill
classes.signature: func LogKill(townRoot, agent, reason string) error

classes.name: FindSimilar
classes.signature: func FindSimilar(target string, candidates []string, maxResults int) []string

classes.name: updateAgentStateOnDone
classes.signature: func updateAgentStateOnDone(cwd, townRoot, exitType, issueID string)

classes.name: scheduleBead
classes.signature: func scheduleBead(beadID, rigName string, opts ScheduleOptions) error

classes.name: dispatchScheduledWork
classes.signature: func dispatchScheduledWork(townRoot, actor string, batchOverride int, dryRun bool) (int, error)

classes.name: buildRestartCommandWithOpts
classes.signature: func buildRestartCommandWithOpts(sessionName string, opts buildRestartCommandOpts) (string, error)

classes.name: createAutoConvoy
classes.signature: func createAutoConvoy(beadID, beadTitle string, owned bool, mergeStrategy, baseBranch string) (_ string, retErr error)

classes.name: resolveTarget
classes.signature: func resolveTarget(target string, opts ResolveTargetOptions) (*ResolvedTarget, error)

classes.name: createStagedConvoy
classes.signature: func createStagedConvoy(dag *ConvoyDAG, waves []Wave, status string, title string) (string, error)

classes.name: syncTarget
classes.signature: func syncTarget(target hooks.Target, dryRun bool) (syncResult, error)

classes.name: createBatchConvoy
classes.signature: func createBatchConvoy(beadIDs []string, rigName string, owned bool, mergeStrategy, baseBranch string) (string, []string, error)

classes.name: discoverRigAgents
classes.signature: func discoverRigAgents(allSessions map[string]bool, r *rig.Rig, crews []string, allAgentBeads map[string]*beads.Issue, allHookBeads map[string]*beads.Issue, mailRouter *mail.Router, skipMail bool) []AgentRuntime

classes.name: nukePolecatFullWithOptions
classes.signature: func nukePolecatFullWithOptions(polecatName, rigName string, mgr *polecat.Manager, r *rig.Rig, opts nukePolecatOptions) error

classes.name: runUnslingWith
classes.signature: func runUnslingWith(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string, dryRun, force bool) error

classes.name: findActivePatrol
classes.signature: func findActivePatrol(cfg PatrolConfig) (patrolID, patrolLine string, found bool, err error)

classes.name: buildAgentBeadID
classes.signature: func buildAgentBeadID(identity string, role Role, townRoot string) string

classes.name: hasSubmittableWorkForRecovery
classes.signature: func hasSubmittableWorkForRecovery(worktreePath string, targetRefs []string, gitState *GitState, gitErr error) bool

classes.name: findOrphanPolecatBranches
classes.signature: func findOrphanPolecatBranches(rigPath, rigName, defaultBranch string) ([]OrphanBranch, []skippedPolecat, error)

classes.name: appendValidationWave
classes.signature: func appendValidationWave(dag *ConvoyDAG, waves []Wave, epicID string) ([]Wave, string, error)

classes.name: executeConvoyFormula
classes.signature: func executeConvoyFormula(f *formula.Formula, formulaName, targetRig string) error

classes.name: rollbackSlingArtifacts
classes.signature: func rollbackSlingArtifacts(spawnInfo *SpawnedPolecatInfo, beadID, hookWorkDir, convoyID string)

classes.name: bdDepListRawIDs
classes.signature: func bdDepListRawIDs(dir, issueID, direction, depType string) ([]string, error)

classes.name: executeWorkflowFormula
classes.signature: func executeWorkflowFormula(f *formula.Formula, formulaName, targetRig string) error

classes.name: startDeaconSession
classes.signature: func startDeaconSession(t *tmux.Tmux, sessionName, agentOverride string) error

classes.name: agentAddressToIDs
classes.signature: func agentAddressToIDs(address string) (beadID, sessionName string, err error)

classes.name: runBatchSling
classes.signature: func runBatchSling(beadIDs []string, rigName string, townBeadsDir string) error

classes.name: storeFieldsInBead
classes.signature: func storeFieldsInBead(beadID string, updates beadFieldUpdates) error

classes.name: outputStatusText
classes.signature: func outputStatusText(w io.Writer, status TownStatus) error

classes.name: parseAddress
classes.signature: func parseAddress(addr string) (rigName, polecatName string, err error)

classes.name: updateStagedConvoy

classes.signature: func showFormulaStepsFull(formulaName, townRoot, rigName string, extraVars ...[]string)

classes.signature: func checkCrossRigGuard(beadID, targetAgent, townRoot string) error

classes.signature: func listConvoyIssues(townBeads, status string, all bool, extraLabels ...string) ([]convoyListIssue, error)

layers.name: Dashboard & TUI
layers.summary_zh: Web 仪表盘与 gt feed 终端 UI
layers.summary_en: web dashboard and the gt feed terminal UI

classes.name: NewCurator
classes.description_zh: 构造 feed 策展器,从 TownSettings 加载去重/聚合配置(缺失时回退默认值),为活动事件流的整理做准备。
classes.description_en: Constructs the feed Curator, loading dedupe/aggregation settings from TownSettings (with defaults as fallback) to prepare the curated activity-event stream.

classes.name: NewConvoyHandler
classes.signature: func NewConvoyHandler(fetcher ConvoyFetcher, fetchTimeout time.Duration, csrfToken string) (*ConvoyHandler, error)
classes.description_zh: 创建 dashboard 主页处理器,绑定数据 fetcher、抓取超时与 CSRF token,并预加载 HTML 模板。
classes.description_en: Creates the dashboard home-page handler, binding a data fetcher, fetch timeout, and CSRF token, and preloading the HTML templates.

classes.name: PrintGtEvents
classes.signature: func PrintGtEvents(townRoot string, opts PrintOptions) error
classes.description_zh: 实现 `gt feed` 的非交互模式:读取 .events.jsonl,按过滤条件打印事件,并可 --follow 实时追加输出。
classes.description_en: Implements the non-interactive `gt feed` mode: reads .events.jsonl, prints filtered events, and optionally tails the file for new events in follow mode.

classes.name: Calculate
classes.description_zh: 依据最后活动时间戳计算活跃度信息(时长、人类可读年龄、绿/黄/红颜色分级),为 dashboard 状态着色提供核心逻辑。
classes.description_en: Computes activity info (age, human-readable duration, green/yellow/red color tier) from a last-activity timestamp, providing the core status color-coding for the dashboard.

classes.name: NewAPIHandler
classes.signature: func NewAPIHandler(defaultRunTimeout, maxRunTimeout time.Duration, csrfToken string) *APIHandler
classes.description_zh: 创建 dashboard 的 /api 处理器,设置 gt 命令执行超时、并发上限与 CSRF token,以支撑前端发起的命令操作。
classes.description_en: Creates the dashboard's /api handler, configuring gt-command run timeouts, a concurrency limit, and CSRF token to back front-end-initiated command actions.

classes.name: RenderMarkdown
classes.description_zh: 用 glamour 将 markdown 渲染为带样式的终端文本,在 agent 模式或禁用颜色时优雅降级为原文。
classes.description_en: Renders markdown into styled terminal text via glamour, gracefully degrading to raw text in agent mode or when colors are disabled.

classes.name: Update
classes.description_zh: feed TUI 的 Bubble Tea 主消息循环,按键、窗口尺寸、事件流与定时刷新分派到各面板状态更新。
classes.description_en: The feed TUI's Bubble Tea message loop, dispatching key, window-size, event-stream, and periodic-refresh messages to update panel state.

classes.name: NewLiveConvoyFetcher
classes.description_zh: 构造从当前 Gas Town 工作区实时抓取数据的 fetcher,加载超时与活跃度阈值配置并构建会话名前缀注册表。
classes.description_en: Constructs the fetcher that pulls live data from the current Gas Town workspace, loading timeout/staleness-threshold config and building a session-name prefix registry.

classes.name: ServeHTTP
classes.description_zh: dashboard /api 的路由入口,校验 CSRF 后将 run、mail、issues、pr、crew、SSE 等请求分发到对应处理函数。
classes.description_en: The dashboard /api routing entry point, validating CSRF then dispatching run, mail, issues, pr, crew, SSE and similar requests to their handlers.

classes.name: NewModel
classes.description_zh: 初始化 feed TUI 模型,装配各面板 viewport、事件历史缓冲、按键映射与卡死检测器。
classes.description_en: Initializes the feed TUI model, wiring up panel viewports, the event-history buffer, key map, and the stuck-agent detector.

classes.name: NewDashboardMux
classes.description_zh: 组装 dashboard 的顶层 HTTP mux,统一生成 CSRF token 并挂载 convoy 主页、/api 与嵌入式静态资源。
classes.description_en: Assembles the dashboard's top-level HTTP mux, generating a shared CSRF token and mounting the convoy home page, /api, and embedded static assets.

classes.name: InitTheme
classes.description_zh: 在程序启动早期解析并固化 CLI 主题模式(深/浅/自动),供后续所有终端着色判断使用。
classes.description_en: Resolves and caches the CLI theme mode (dark/light/auto) early at startup, for use by all subsequent terminal color decisions.

classes.name: ShouldUseColor
classes.description_zh: 依据 NO_COLOR、CLICOLOR、CLICOLOR_FORCE 约定及 TTY 状态判定是否输出 ANSI 颜色码。
classes.description_en: Decides whether to emit ANSI color codes based on the NO_COLOR / CLICOLOR / CLICOLOR_FORCE conventions and TTY state.

classes.name: NewStuckDetectorWithSource
classes.description_zh: 以可注入的 HealthDataSource 构造卡死检测器,使其能在测试中接入 mock 健康数据源。
classes.description_en: Constructs the stuck-agent detector around an injectable HealthDataSource, enabling testing with mock health data sources.

classes.name: RenderMuted
classes.description_zh: 以灰色弱化样式渲染文本,用于次要/辅助信息的终端展示。
classes.description_en: Renders text in muted (gray) styling for secondary or auxiliary terminal output.

classes.name: FetchWorkers
classes.description_zh: 抓取所有正在运行的 worker 会话(polecat 与 refinery)及其活跃度数据,供 dashboard 的工作者面板展示。
classes.description_en: Fetches all running worker sessions (polecats and refinery) with their activity data for the dashboard's workers panel.

classes.name: NewSetupAPIHandler
classes.description_zh: 创建 setup 模式的 /api 处理器,持有 CSRF token 以保护安装/启动等 POST 操作。
classes.description_en: Creates the setup-mode /api handler, holding a CSRF token to protect install/launch and other POST operations.

classes.name: FetchMergeQueue
classes.description_zh: 遍历已注册的 rig,经 gh CLI 抓取各仓库的开放 PR,汇成 dashboard 的合并队列视图。
classes.description_en: Iterates registered rigs and, via the gh CLI, fetches each repo's open PRs to build the dashboard's merge-queue view.

classes.name: FetchConvoys
classes.description_zh: 列出所有开放 convoy 及其活跃度数据,并用断路器防止后端持续失败时的进程风暴,是 dashboard 主视图的核心数据源。
classes.description_en: Lists all open convoys with their activity data, guarded by a circuit breaker against process storms on persistent backend failure — the core data source for the dashboard's main view.

classes.name: FetchActivity
classes.description_zh: 从 .events.jsonl 事件日志读取并汇总近期活动,供 dashboard 的活动流面板展示。
classes.description_en: Reads and summarizes recent activity from the .events.jsonl event log for the dashboard's activity-feed panel.

classes.name: RenderPassIcon
classes.description_zh: 渲染带成功样式的通过(pass)状态图标。
classes.description_en: Renders the pass-status icon with its success styling.

classes.name: RenderWarnIcon
classes.description_zh: 渲染带警告样式的告警(warn)状态图标。
classes.description_en: Renders the warning-status icon with its warn styling.

classes.name: RenderFailIcon
classes.description_zh: 渲染带失败样式的失败(fail)状态图标。
classes.description_en: Renders the fail-status icon with its failure styling.

classes.name: NewSetupMux
classes.description_zh: 组装 setup 引导模式的 HTTP mux,生成 CSRF token 并挂载安装页与 setup /api。
classes.description_en: Assembles the HTTP mux for setup/onboarding mode, generating a CSRF token and mounting the install page and setup /api.

classes.name: FetchMayor
classes.description_zh: 抓取 Mayor(协调者)的当前状态与会话挂载情况,供 dashboard 顶层监控展示。
classes.description_en: Fetches the Mayor's current status and session-attach state for the dashboard's top-level monitoring view.

classes.name: ServeHTTP
classes.description_zh: setup /api 的路由入口,校验 CSRF 后分发 install、rig/add、check-workspace、launch、status 等请求。
classes.description_en: The setup /api routing entry point, validating CSRF then dispatching install, rig/add, check-workspace, launch, and status requests.

classes.name: NewBdActivitySource
classes.description_zh: 启动 `bd activity --follow` 子进程并将其输出实时解析为事件流,为 feed TUI 提供活动事件来源。
classes.description_en: Spawns a `bd activity --follow` subprocess and parses its output into a live event stream, providing the feed TUI's activity-event source.

classes.name: FetchRigs
classes.description_zh: 从 mayor/rigs.json 读取所有已注册 rig 及其 agent 数量,供 dashboard 的 rig 概览面板展示。
classes.description_en: Reads all registered rigs and their agent counts from mayor/rigs.json for the dashboard's rig-overview panel.

classes.name: FetchDogs
classes.description_zh: 扫描 kennel 目录,汇总各 dog(监管进程)及其状态,供 dashboard 的 dogs 面板展示。
classes.description_en: Scans the kennel directory to gather each dog (watchdog process) and its state for the dashboard's dogs panel.

classes.name: FetchEscalations
classes.description_zh: 查询带 gt:escalation 标签的开放升级事项,汇成 dashboard 中需人工关注的升级列表。
classes.description_en: Queries open issues labeled gt:escalation to build the dashboard's list of escalations needing human attention.

classes.name: FetchSessions
classes.description_zh: 列出活跃的 tmux 会话并做角色识别,供 dashboard 展示当前各 agent 会话。
classes.description_en: Lists active tmux sessions with role detection for the dashboard's view of current agent sessions.

classes.name: FetchIssues
classes.description_zh: 查询开放与已挂接(in-progress)的 issue,组成 dashboard 工作面板的待办/在办 backlog。
classes.description_en: Queries open and hooked (in-progress) issues to form the backlog of to-do/in-progress work for the dashboard's Work panel.

classes.name: LoadTemplates
classes.description_zh: 从嵌入文件系统解析全部 dashboard HTML 模板,并注册各类状态着色等模板函数。
classes.description_en: Parses all dashboard HTML templates from the embedded filesystem and registers the template functions (status color-coding, etc.).

classes.name: ToPager
classes.signature: func ToPager(content string, opts PagerOptions) error

classes.name: runGtCommand
classes.signature: func (h *APIHandler) runGtCommand(ctx context.Context, timeout time.Duration, args []string) (string, error)

classes.name: sendError
classes.signature: func (h *APIHandler) sendError(w http.ResponseWriter, message string, status int)

classes.name: parseIssueShowOutput
classes.signature: func parseIssueShowOutput(output string, issueID string) IssueShowResponse

classes.name: runBdCommand
classes.signature: func (h *APIHandler) runBdCommand(ctx context.Context, timeout time.Duration, args []string) (string, error)

classes.name: deriveSessionName
classes.signature: func deriveSessionName(rig, role, name string) string

classes.signature: func (h *SetupAPIHandler) sendError(w http.ResponseWriter, msg string, status int)

classes.name: runGtCommand
classes.signature: func (h *SetupAPIHandler) runGtCommand(ctx context.Context, timeout time.Duration, args []string) (string, error)

layers.name: Diagnostics
layers.summary_zh: gt doctor 健康检查与修复引擎
layers.summary_en: the gt doctor health-check and repair engine

classes.name: Print
classes.signature: func (r *Report) Print(w io.Writer, verbose bool, slowThreshold time.Duration)
classes.description_zh: 将完整的体检报告输出到 writer:按类别分组逐项打印检查结果、慢检查耗时,并附上汇总与告警/错误修复建议区。
classes.description_en: Renders the full doctor report to a writer, grouping checks by category with status icons, slow-check timings, and a summary plus warnings/fixes section.

classes.name: FixStreaming
classes.signature: func (d *Doctor) FixStreaming(ctx *CheckContext, w io.Writer, slowThreshold time.Duration) *Report
classes.description_zh: 依次运行所有检查并对失败且可修复的项尝试自动修复(带 panic 兜底),修复后重跑校验,实时把检查/修复进度流式输出到 writer。
classes.description_en: Runs every registered check and auto-repairs failing fixable ones with panic recovery, re-running each to verify, while streaming live check/fix progress to a writer.

classes.name: NewEnvVarsCheckWithReader
classes.description_zh: 构造 env-vars 检查并注入自定义 SessionEnvReader,用于测试时读取 tmux 会话环境变量。
classes.description_en: Constructs the env-vars check with an injected SessionEnvReader, used to feed tmux session environment variables in tests.

classes.name: RunStreaming
classes.signature: func (d *Doctor) RunStreaming(ctx *CheckContext, w io.Writer, slowThreshold time.Duration) *Report
classes.description_zh: 按注册顺序逐个运行所有检查(不做修复),记录每项耗时并实时把进度与结果流式输出到 writer,汇总成 Report。
classes.description_en: Executes all registered checks in order without fixing, timing each and streaming live progress and results to a writer, then aggregating them into a Report.

classes.name: NewClaudeSettingsCheck
classes.description_zh: 构造 claude-settings 检查,验证各 Claude settings.json 文件是否与期望模板一致、未过期且位置正确。
classes.description_en: Constructs the claude-settings check that verifies Claude settings.json files match the expected templates and are present in the right location.

classes.name: NewBeadsRedirectTargetCheck
classes.description_zh: 构造 beads-redirect-target 检查,验证各 worktree 的 .beads/redirect 指向的目标存在且具备可用的 beads 配置。
classes.description_en: Constructs the beads-redirect-target check that verifies each worktree's .beads/redirect points to an existing target with a working beads setup.

classes.name: RigChecks
classes.description_zh: 返回所有 rig 级健康检查的集合(git 仓库、bare repo、witness/refinery、beads 重定向、testutil 软链等),供 Doctor 注册。
classes.description_en: Returns the full set of rig-level health checks (git repo, bare repo, witness/refinery, beads redirects, testutil symlinks, etc.) for the Doctor to register.

classes.name: Run
classes.description_zh: 扫描数据库中已无对应磁盘 agent 的陈旧 crew/polecat agent bead 以及前缀不在 routes.jsonl 中的已注销 rig 残留 bead,报告以便关闭清理。
classes.description_en: Scans for stale crew/polecat agent beads with no on-disk agent and orphaned beads from deregistered rigs (prefix absent from routes.jsonl), reporting them for closure.

classes.name: Run
classes.description_zh: 校验每个已注册 rig 是否拥有 config.json、Dolt 数据库、metadata、身份 bead 及正确的前缀/数据库名,逐项收集缺失与不一致供修复。
classes.description_en: Verifies each registered rig has its config.json, Dolt database, metadata, identity bead, and matching prefix/db name, collecting all gaps and mismatches for the fixer.

classes.name: Run
classes.description_zh: 检查所有受管的 Claude 与模板化 agent 的 hooks/settings 文件内容是否与 gt hooks sync 应生成的结果一致,标记出不同步的目标。
classes.description_en: Checks that all managed Claude and template-based agent hooks/settings files match what gt hooks sync would generate, flagging any out-of-sync targets.

classes.name: Fix
classes.description_zh: 为缺失 agent bead 的全局/每-rig/crew agent 创建身份 bead,使每个 agent 在其 rig 配置的前缀下都拥有应有的 bead。
classes.description_en: Creates the missing identity beads for global, per-rig, and crew agents so every agent has its expected agent bead under its rig's configured prefix.

classes.name: Category
classes.description_zh: 返回检查所属的分类标签,供报告按类别(Core/Rig/Config 等)分组输出。
classes.description_en: Returns the check's category label so the report can group checks (Core/Rig/Config, etc.) in its output.

classes.name: WorkspaceChecks
classes.description_zh: 返回所有工作区级健康检查(town config、rigs 注册表、mayor 目录的存在与有效性),供 Doctor 注册。
classes.description_en: Returns all workspace-level health checks (town config, rigs registry, and mayor directory existence/validity) for the Doctor to register.

classes.name: NewBareRepoExistsCheck
classes.description_zh: 构造 bare-repo-exists 检查,验证当 worktree 依赖共享裸仓库时 .repo.git 确实存在且可用。
classes.description_en: Constructs the bare-repo-exists check that verifies .repo.git is present and usable when worktrees depend on the shared bare repository.

classes.name: Fix
classes.description_zh: 为缺失项补齐:创建 config.json、初始化 Dolt 数据库、写入 metadata 与 config.yaml,并补建 rig 身份 bead,使 rig 配置与注册表同步。
classes.description_en: Repairs the gaps by creating config.json files, initializing Dolt databases, writing metadata/config.yaml, and creating rig identity beads to bring rig config back in sync.

classes.name: Run
classes.description_zh: 依据 routes.jsonl 前缀,核验全局(deacon/mayor)、每-rig(witness/refinery)及 crew 各 agent 在对应 beads 库中是否都存在身份 bead。
classes.description_en: Verifies, using routes.jsonl prefixes, that identity beads exist in the appropriate beads database for global (deacon/mayor), per-rig (witness/refinery), and crew agents.

classes.name: Description
classes.description_zh: 返回检查的人类可读描述文本,供报告展示该检查的用途。
classes.description_en: Returns the check's human-readable description text for display in the report.

classes.name: NewPrimingCheck
classes.description_zh: 构造 priming 检查,验证各 agent 位置的 priming 子系统(gt prime hook 链)配置正确,以保证 agent 启动时获得上下文。
classes.description_en: Constructs the priming check that verifies the priming subsystem (gt prime hook chain) is correctly configured across agent locations so agents get context on startup.

classes.name: Fix
classes.description_zh: 依据 rig 的 git_url 从远端重建丢失或损坏的 .repo.git 裸仓库并重新注册已有 worktree,同时修正 push URL 不匹配。
classes.description_en: Recreates a missing or corrupt .repo.git bare repo from the rig's git_url and re-registers existing worktrees, also fixing push-URL mismatches.

classes.name: NewSparseCheckoutCheck
classes.description_zh: 构造 sparse-checkout 检查,检测应被移除的遗留 git sparse checkout 配置(其曾用于排除 .claude/,现已不需要)。
classes.description_en: Constructs the sparse-checkout check that detects legacy git sparse-checkout configuration that should be removed (formerly used to exclude .claude/).

classes.name: Run
classes.description_zh: 扫描所有 rig 与 deacon dogs 的 worktree,检测 .git 文件的 gitdir 指向已不存在(仓库丢失或跨机迁移导致路径前缀变化)的情况。
classes.description_en: Scans all rigs and deacon dogs for worktrees whose .git gitdir reference points to a non-existent path (missing repo or path-prefix change after machine relocation).

classes.name: NewBeadsRedirectCheck
classes.description_zh: 构造 beads-redirect 检查,验证当仓库的 .beads/ 被 git 跟踪时 rig 根目录存在指向该位置的 redirect 文件。
classes.description_en: Constructs the beads-redirect check that verifies a rig-root redirect file points to tracked .beads/ when the repo carries beads in git.

classes.name: NewMalformedSessionNameCheck
classes.description_zh: 构造 session-name-format 检查,检测使用遗留命名格式({prefix}-{rig_name}-{role})而非当前短前缀格式的 tmux 会话。
classes.description_en: Constructs the session-name-format check that detects tmux sessions using the legacy {prefix}-{rig_name}-{role} naming instead of the current short-prefix format.

classes.name: NewWorktreeGitdirCheck
classes.description_zh: 构造 worktree-gitdir-valid 检查,验证各 worktree 的 .git 文件引用的 gitdir 路径真实存在。
classes.description_en: Constructs the worktree-gitdir-valid check that verifies each worktree's .git file references an existing gitdir path.

classes.name: Run
classes.description_zh: 针对指定 rig 检查 .repo.git 是否存在、可用且 push URL 与 config.json 一致,记录因裸仓库缺失/损坏而断裂的 worktree。
classes.description_en: For the targeted rig, checks whether .repo.git exists, is usable, and its push URL matches config.json, recording worktrees broken by a missing or corrupt bare repo.

classes.name: Run
classes.description_zh: 检测会话已死但 worktree 仍有未推送提交的 polecat(清理前若 nuke 会永久丢失已提交工作),警告这些有风险的分支。
classes.description_en: Detects polecats whose tmux session died while their worktree still holds unpushed commits, warning about at-risk branches that nuking would permanently lose.

classes.name: NewStaleBeadsRedirectCheck
classes.description_zh: 构造 stale-beads-redirect 检查,检测同时存在 redirect 文件与陈旧数据文件的 .beads 目录,并校验 worktree 重定向拓扑是否正确。
classes.description_en: Constructs the stale-beads-redirect check that detects .beads directories holding both a redirect and stale data files, and validates worktree redirect topology.

classes.name: PrintSummaryOnly
classes.signature: func (r *Report) PrintSummaryOnly(w io.Writer, verbose bool, slowThreshold time.Duration)
classes.description_zh: 在流式输出已逐项打印检查后,仅补打分隔线、汇总统计与告警/错误修复建议区(避免重复打印各检查项)。
classes.description_en: After streaming has already printed each check, outputs only the separator, summary stats, and warnings/fixes section to avoid re-printing individual checks.

classes.name: NewDoctor
classes.description_zh: 创建一个尚未注册任何检查的空 Doctor 实例,作为健康检查的注册与执行容器。
classes.description_en: Creates an empty Doctor with no registered checks, serving as the container that registers and executes the health checks.

classes.name: NewTestutilSymlinkCheck
classes.description_zh: 构造 testutil-symlink 检查,验证 crew 与 refinery/rig 的 internal/testutil/ 是指向 mayor/rig 规范副本的软链,以防跨 rig 克隆出现副本漂移。
classes.description_en: Constructs the testutil-symlink check that verifies crew and refinery/rig internal/testutil/ dirs are symlinks to the canonical mayor/rig copy, preventing copy drift.

classes.name: NewDatabasePrefixCheck
classes.description_zh: 构造 database-prefix 检查,验证每个 rig 的实际 Dolt 数据库 issue_prefix 与 routes.jsonl 路由表所声明的前缀一致。
classes.description_en: Constructs the database-prefix check that verifies each rig's actual Dolt database issue_prefix matches the prefix declared in routes.jsonl.

classes.name: NewSocketSplitBrainCheck
classes.description_zh: 构造 socket-split-brain 检查,检测同时存在于 town socket 与 default socket 上的重复 tmux 会话(会导致 gt nudge 等会话发现命令失败)。
classes.description_en: Constructs the socket-split-brain check that detects tmux sessions duplicated on both the town socket and the default socket, which breaks gt nudge session discovery.

classes.name: Run
classes.description_zh: 遍历各 rig 的 worktree redirect 文件,校验其目标存在、是目录且具备可用 beads 配置,收集断裂的重定向目标供修复。
classes.description_en: Walks each rig's worktree redirect files, checking that the target exists, is a directory, and has a working beads setup, collecting broken targets for the fixer.

classes.name: Fix
classes.description_zh: 创建缺失的 refinery 目录结构(refinery 目录及邮箱等所需文件),补全不完整的 refinery 布局。
classes.description_en: Creates the missing refinery directory structure (the refinery dir and required files such as mailboxes) to complete an incomplete refinery layout.

classes.name: Fix
classes.description_zh: 创建或修正 rig 根目录的 beads redirect 文件使其指向被跟踪的 .beads,若 beads 缺失则初始化。
classes.description_en: Creates or corrects the rig-root beads redirect file so it points to the tracked .beads, initializing beads if none exists.

classes.name: NewOverlayHealthCheck
classes.description_zh: 构造 overlay-health 检查,扫描 town/rig 级 formula overlay 文件并校验其每个 step_id 都对应嵌入 formula 中的真实步骤。
classes.description_en: Constructs the overlay-health check that scans town/rig-level formula overlay files and verifies every step_id references a real step in the embedded formula.

layers.name: Orchestration & Agents
layers.summary_zh: 多代理协调核心:Mayor/Polecat/Witness/Deacon/Refinery 与守护进程
layers.summary_en: multi-agent coordination core: Mayor/Polecat/Witness/Deacon/Refinery and the daemon

classes.name: AddRig
classes.description_zh: 创建一个新 Rig（项目容器）：建立容器目录、写入 rig 配置、为 refinery/mayor 等角色克隆 git 工作区,并初始化 rig 级 beads,是把一个 git 仓库纳入多智能体编排体系的入口。
classes.description_en: Creates a new Rig (project container) — scaffolds the container directory, writes rig config, clones git worktrees for refinery/mayor roles and inits rig-level beads, the entry point that brings a git repo under the multi-agent orchestration.

classes.name: AddWithOptions
classes.signature: func (m *Manager) AddWithOptions(name string, opts AddOptions) (_ *Polecat, retErr error)
classes.description_zh: 在锁保护与磁盘空间预检下生成一个新的 Polecat（临时 worker 智能体）工作区,创建 git worktree 并原子设置 hook_bead,是把待办 bead 派发给一个全新短命 agent 的核心生成路径。
classes.description_en: Spawns a fresh Polecat (ephemeral worker agent) under per-polecat locking and disk-space pre-checks, creating its git worktree and atomically setting hook_bead — the core spawn path that hands a work bead to a brand-new short-lived agent.

classes.name: NewEngineer
classes.description_zh: 为某个 Rig 构造 Refinery 的 Engineer——合并队列的执行核心,绑定该 rig 的 git 工作区、beads 客户端、邮件路由器与合并槽(merge slot)获取/释放回调。
classes.description_en: Constructs the Refinery's Engineer for a rig — the merge-queue execution core wired with the rig's git worktree, beads client, mail router and merge-slot acquire/release callbacks.

classes.name: ReuseIdlePolecat
classes.signature: func (m *Manager) ReuseIdlePolecat(name string, opts AddOptions) (*Polecat, error)
classes.description_zh: 复用一个空闲 Polecat:在锁保护下拉取最新代码、切出全新分支、重置 agent bead 并原子挂上新的 hook_bead,避免反复销毁重建 worktree 而把闲置 worker 直接转岗到新任务。
classes.description_en: Recycles an idle Polecat — under lock it fetches latest, cuts a fresh branch, resets the agent bead and atomically attaches a new hook_bead, redeploying an idle worker onto new work instead of tearing down and recreating its worktree.

classes.name: Scan
classes.signature: func Scan(db *sql.DB, dbName string, maxAge, purgeAge, mailDeleteAge, staleIssueAge time.Duration) (*ScanResult, error)
classes.description_zh: 只读地统计 Reaper 的清理候选(过期开放 wisp、可清除的已关闭 wisp、过期邮件与陈旧 issue),为后台垃圾回收提供 dry-run 计数而不修改任何数据。
classes.description_en: Read-only Reaper scan that counts garbage-collection candidates (stale open wisps, purgeable closed wisps, expired mail, stale issues), providing a dry-run tally for the background cleanup without mutating anything.

classes.name: Rename
classes.description_zh: 重命名一个 Crew(人类工作区)worker,按字母序双锁两个名字以防死锁后迁移其目录,维护人类参与者在 town 中的工作区身份。
classes.description_en: Renames a Crew (human workspace) worker, locking both names in alphabetical order to avoid deadlock before moving its directory, maintaining a human participant's workspace identity in the town.

classes.name: RemoveWithOptions
classes.signature: func (m *Manager) RemoveWithOptions(name string, force, nuclear, selfNuke bool) (retErr error)
classes.description_zh: 在 force/nuclear/selfNuke 等不同安全级别下删除一个 Polecat 的 worktree,可优先读取 agent bead 的 cleanup_status 判断未提交工作,是短命 worker 智能体的销毁/回收路径。
classes.description_en: Deletes a Polecat's worktree under graded safety levels (force/nuclear/selfNuke), consulting the agent bead's cleanup_status to detect uncommitted work — the teardown/reaping path for ephemeral worker agents.

classes.name: Allocate
classes.description_zh: 从主题命名池中按顺序分配一个未占用的 Polecat 名字,池满时回退到 overflow 编号命名,为每个新生成的 worker 智能体提供唯一身份标识。
classes.description_en: Allocates the next free name from the themed name pool (falling back to numbered overflow names when exhausted), giving each newly spawned worker agent a unique identity.

classes.name: ClearWork
classes.description_zh: 在锁保护下清除某个 Dog(Deacon 的跨 rig 助手 worker)的工作分配并将其置为 idle 状态,把该助手交还到可调度的空闲池。
classes.description_en: Under lock, clears a Dog's (Deacon's cross-rig helper worker) work assignment and sets it idle, returning the helper to the dispatchable idle pool.

classes.name: New
classes.description_zh: 构造后台 daemon 实例:建立日志目录与轮转、补全子进程查找用的 PATH,并装配巡逻调度所需的上下文,是托管 watchdog 巡逻的常驻进程的初始化入口。
classes.description_en: Constructs the background daemon instance — sets up the rotating log, augments PATH for subprocess lookups and wires the context for patrol scheduling, the init entry for the long-lived process that hosts the watchdog patrol.

classes.name: Run
classes.description_zh: 启动 daemon 主循环:用 flock 排他锁防止多实例、做 Dolt 后端预检与 metadata 修复、写 PID 文件,随后进入 watchdog 巡逻调度,是整个编排后台的运行核心。
classes.description_en: Runs the daemon main loop — takes an exclusive flock to prevent multiple instances, pre-flights the Dolt backend and repairs metadata, writes the PID file, then drives the watchdog patrol scheduling that powers the whole orchestration backend.

classes.name: ProcessBatch
classes.signature: func (e *Engineer) ProcessBatch(ctx context.Context, batch []*MRInfo, target string, batchCfg *BatchConfig) *BatchResult
classes.description_zh: 用 batch-then-bisect 算法处理一批 MR:堆叠 rebase、一次性跑门禁,绿则快进推送,红则重试或二分定位罪魁,是 Refinery 合并队列吞吐多个 MR 的批处理核心。
classes.description_en: Processes a batch of MRs with the batch-then-bisect algorithm — stacks the rebase, runs gates once, fast-forward-pushes if green, otherwise retries or bisects to isolate the culprit, the Refinery merge-queue's batch-throughput core.

classes.name: RepairWorktreeWithOptions
classes.signature: func (m *Manager) RepairWorktreeWithOptions(name string, force bool, opts AddOptions) (*Polecat, error)
classes.description_zh: 修复一个陈旧 Polecat:在锁保护下重建全新 git worktree 并原子设置 hook_bead,把损坏/失联的 worker 工作区恢复到可工作状态。
classes.description_en: Repairs a stale Polecat — under lock it rebuilds a fresh git worktree and atomically sets hook_bead, restoring a broken or detached worker workspace to a working state.

classes.name: DetectZombiePolecats
classes.signature: func DetectZombiePolecats(bd *BdCli, workDir, rigName string, router *mail.Router) *DetectZombiePolecatsResult
classes.description_zh: Witness 巡逻处理器,从 polecat 目录扫描僵尸 worker(会话已死、agent 挂起、git 状态脏等),按情况重启会话或上报 cleanup_status 并创建清理 wisp,是单 rig agent 健康监控的核心检测。
classes.description_en: A Witness patrol handler that scans polecat directories for zombie workers (dead session, hung agent, dirty git state), restarting sessions or reporting cleanup_status and filing cleanup wisps — the core health detection of the per-rig agent monitor.

classes.name: DetectStalledPolecats
classes.description_zh: Witness 检测启动期卡住的 Polecat(超过阈值无 tmux 活动),通过盲发按键序列消除工作区信任/权限等阻塞对话框,使新生 worker 越过启动僵死继续干活。
classes.description_en: Witness detection of polecats stalled during startup (no tmux activity past threshold), dismissing blocking dialogs (workspace-trust, permissions) via blind key sequences so a freshly spawned worker can get past the startup hang.

classes.name: DefaultBdCli
classes.description_zh: 返回一个真实 shell 调用 bd 二进制的 BdCli 包装器,作为 Witness 各检测处理器与 beads CLI 交互的默认依赖注入实现(测试可替换为 mock)。
classes.description_en: Returns a BdCli wrapper that shells out to the real bd binary, the default dependency-injected adapter through which the Witness handlers talk to the beads CLI (mockable in tests).

classes.name: InitBeads
classes.signature: func (m *Manager) InitBeads(rigPath, prefix, rigName string) error
classes.description_zh: 在 rig 级初始化 beads 数据库:校验前缀、按需建立 redirect 或本地库、配置 Dolt server 连接与自定义类型并清理 orphan 库,为该 Rig 建立 issue/工作追踪的数据底座。
classes.description_en: Initializes the rig-level beads database — validates the prefix, creates a redirect or local DB, configures the Dolt server connection and custom types and drops orphan DBs, laying a Rig's issue/work-tracking data foundation.

classes.name: RefreshRig
classes.description_zh: 为某个 Dog 在指定 rig 上重建全新 worktree(拒绝刷新正在工作的 dog),原子更新其 worktree 状态,使该跨 rig 助手在单个 rig 上获得干净的工作区。
classes.description_en: Rebuilds a single rig's worktree for a Dog (refusing to refresh a working dog) and atomically updates its worktree state, giving the cross-rig helper a clean workspace on that one rig.

classes.name: NewNamePoolWithConfig
classes.signature: func NewNamePoolWithConfig(rigPath, rigName, theme string, customNames []string, maxSize int) *NamePool
classes.description_zh: 按主题、自定义名单与最大池大小构造 Polecat 命名池,并将状态文件指向 rig 的 .runtime 目录,为某个 rig 的 worker 智能体命名供给做配置化初始化。
classes.description_en: Constructs a Polecat name pool from theme, custom names and max size with its state file under the rig's .runtime dir — the configurable init of a rig's worker-agent naming supply.

classes.name: AssignWork
classes.description_zh: 在锁保护下给某个 Dog 分配工作内容并置为 working 状态、记录开始时间,是 Deacon 把跨 rig 任务下派给其助手 worker 的状态转换点。
classes.description_en: Under lock, assigns work to a Dog and flips it to the working state with a start timestamp — the state transition where the Deacon dispatches cross-rig work to its helper worker.

classes.name: BuildRebaseStack
classes.signature: func (e *Engineer) BuildRebaseStack(ctx context.Context, batch []*MRInfo, target string) (stacked []*MRInfo, conflicts []*MRInfo, err error)
classes.description_zh: 在目标分支上顺序 squash-merge 构建一组 MR 的 rebase 堆叠(target ← MR1 ← MR2 …),分离出成功堆叠与冲突的 MR,是 Refinery 批量合并前的堆栈搭建步骤。
classes.description_en: Builds a squash-merge rebase stack of MRs on the target branch (target ← MR1 ← MR2 …), separating successfully stacked MRs from conflicting ones — the stack-assembly step before a Refinery batch merge.

classes.name: Queue
classes.description_zh: 以 beads 中开放的 merge-request issue 为唯一真相来源,按优先级打分排序返回当前 Refinery 合并队列(无状态文件,ZFC 合规),向调用方暴露待合并的 MR 顺序。
classes.description_en: Returns the current Refinery merge queue by reading open merge-request issues from beads as the single source of truth and scoring them by priority (stateless/ZFC-compliant), exposing the pending-MR ordering.

classes.name: Refresh
classes.description_zh: 为某个 Dog 在所有已配置 rig 上逐个原子重建 worktree(拒绝刷新正在工作的 dog),每个 rig 完成即落盘状态,使该跨 rig 助手获得全套干净工作区。
classes.description_en: Rebuilds a Dog's worktrees across every configured rig atomically (refusing a working dog), persisting state after each rig so the cross-rig helper ends up with a clean full set of workspaces.

classes.name: DetectOrphanedMolecules
classes.signature: func DetectOrphanedMolecules(bd *BdCli, workDir, rigName string, router *mail.Router) *DetectOrphanedMoleculesResult
classes.description_zh: Witness 从 beads 一侧扫描所属 polecat 已不存在的 mol-polecat-work 分子实例,关闭分子及其后代步骤以解阻塞父级工作 bead,弥补按目录扫描漏掉的孤儿。
classes.description_en: A Witness handler scanning from beads for mol-polecat-work molecule instances whose owning polecat no longer exists, closing the molecule and its descendant steps to unblock the parent work bead — catching orphans the directory scan misses.

classes.name: Reset
classes.description_zh: 重置命名池状态、释放所有已占用名字并把 overflow 计数归位,使该 rig 的 worker 命名供给回到全空可用状态。
classes.description_en: Resets the name pool — releases all in-use names and rewinds the overflow counter, returning the rig's worker-naming supply to a fully-available state.

classes.name: CopyOverlay
classes.description_zh: 把 rig 的 .runtime/overlay 下的根级文件(如 .env、config.json)复制到新工作区,失败仅告警不中断,为新生成 worker 注入 rig 级运行时配置叠加层。
classes.description_en: Copies root-level files from the rig's .runtime/overlay (e.g. .env, config.json) into a new workspace (warning, not failing, on per-file errors), injecting the rig's runtime config overlay into a freshly spawned worker.

classes.name: EnsureGitignorePatterns
classes.description_zh: 向工作区 .gitignore 补全 Gas Town 所需的忽略模式(刻意不含 .beads/),避免 worker worktree 把运行时垃圾误纳入版本控制而破坏 gt done 流程。
classes.description_en: Appends the Gas Town-required ignore patterns to a worktree's .gitignore (deliberately excluding .beads/), keeping runtime cruft out of version control so a worker worktree's gt done flow isn't broken.

classes.name: DiscoverCompletions
classes.signature: func DiscoverCompletions(bd *BdCli, workDir, rigName string, router *mail.Router) *DiscoverCompletionsResult
classes.description_zh: Witness 每个巡逻周期从 beads 观察各 Polecat 的完成元数据,据 exit_type 分别确认/建清理 wisp 并向 Refinery 发 MERGE_READY,处理后清空元数据,体现『发现而非追踪』地驱动完成流转。
classes.description_en: Each patrol cycle, the Witness observes Polecat completion metadata from beads and, per exit_type, acknowledges, files a cleanup wisp and sends MERGE_READY to the Refinery, then clears the metadata — the 'discover, don't track' driver of completion flow.

classes.name: ShouldBlockRespawn
classes.description_zh: 判断某个 bead 是否已被重生 MaxBeadRespawns 次:超限则返回 true,提示调用方升级给 mayor 而非再次重派,是防止 spawn 风暴的主熔断器。
classes.description_en: Reports whether a bead has already been respawned MaxBeadRespawns times — returning true so the caller escalates to the mayor instead of re-dispatching, the primary circuit breaker against spawn storms.

classes.name: DetectOrphanedBeads
classes.signature: func DetectOrphanedBeads(bd *BdCli, workDir, rigName string, router *mail.Router) *DetectOrphanedBeadsResult
classes.description_zh: Witness 从 beads 一侧扫描挂在已不存在 polecat 上的 in_progress/hooked bead,弥补 DetectZombiePolecats 按目录扫描漏掉的(polecat 已被销毁但 bead 仍占用)情形。
classes.description_en: A Witness handler scanning from beads for in_progress/hooked beads assigned to non-existent polecats, complementing the directory-based DetectZombiePolecats to catch beads still held after their polecat was nuked.

classes.name: RecordBeadRespawn
classes.description_zh: 为某个 bead 的重生计数加一并返回新值,经进程内互斥锁与跨进程 flock 串行化以防并发巡逻周期竞争,状态落盘失败也不阻断重生本身,是 spawn 熔断器的计数侧。
classes.description_en: Increments a bead's respawn counter and returns the new count, serialized via in-process mutex and cross-process flock to prevent concurrent patrol cycles from racing (and never blocking the respawn on a save failure) — the counting side of the spawn circuit breaker.

classes.name: RunTargetCleanHook
classes.signature: func RunTargetCleanHook(polecatDir, clonePath string, policy TargetCleanPolicy) (string, error)
classes.description_zh: 按 TargetCleanPolicy(如 every_n_beads)在 Polecat 复用时决定是否清理 worktree 的 target/ 构建目录,无条件累加并持久化计数器,清理失败仅作警告不阻断复用路径。
classes.description_en: Decides, per TargetCleanPolicy (e.g. every_n_beads), whether to wipe a Polecat worktree's target/ build dir on reuse — always bumping and persisting the counter, with clean failures treated as warnings that never block the reuse path.

classes.name: StartACP
classes.signature: func (m *Manager) StartACP(ctx context.Context, agentOverride, rigName string) error
classes.description_zh: 以 ACP 模式启动 Mayor(AI 协调者)会话:确保单实例、解析并校验支持 ACP 的 agent 配置、注入角色/rig 环境变量并切到 mayor 工作目录,是协调者从 TMUX 切到 ACP 的接入点。
classes.description_en: Starts the Mayor (AI coordinator) session in ACP mode — enforces single-instance, resolves and validates an ACP-capable agent config, injects role/rig env vars and cds into the mayor dir, the coordinator's TMUX-to-ACP entry point.

classes.name: PostMerge
classes.description_zh: 对成功合并的 MR 执行合并后清理:关闭 MR bead 与其源 issue(分支删除留给调用方),完成 Refinery 合并队列条目的收尾。
classes.description_en: Performs post-merge cleanup for a successfully merged MR — closes the MR bead and its source issue (branch deletion left to the caller), finalizing a Refinery merge-queue item.

classes.name: HandlePolecatDoneFromBead
classes.signature: func HandlePolecatDoneFromBead(bd *BdCli, workDir, rigName, polecatName string, fields *beads.AgentFields, router *mail.Router) *HandlerResult
classes.description_zh: Witness 直接从 agent bead 描述字段(exit_type/mr_id/branch 等)读取 Polecat 完成情况并处理(有 MR 则建清理 wisp 发 MERGE_READY,无 MR 则确认),作为 polecat 自管完成之外的崩溃恢复安全网。
classes.description_en: A Witness handler that reads Polecat completion straight from the agent bead's description fields (exit_type/mr_id/branch…) and processes it (MR → cleanup wisp + MERGE_READY; no MR → acknowledge), a crash-recovery safety net behind polecat self-managed completion.

classes.name: ParseThemeFile
classes.description_zh: 解析自定义命名主题文件(每行一名,过滤注释/空行/过短/非法/保留名并去重),为 Polecat 命名池提供自定义名字来源。
classes.description_en: Parses a custom naming theme file (one name per line, filtering comments/blanks/too-short/invalid/reserved names and de-duplicating), supplying custom names to the Polecat name pool.

classes.name: NewConvoyManager
classes.signature: func NewConvoyManager(townRoot string, logger func(format string, args ...interface{}), gtPath string, scanInterval time.Duration, stores map[string]beadsdk.Storage, openStores func() map[string]beadsdk.Storage, isRigParked func(string) bool) *ConvoyManager
classes.description_zh: 构造 ConvoyManager:管理跨 rig 的 convoy 生命周期,通过事件轮询与周期性 stranded 扫描发现搁浅工作,支持 store 惰性初始化与 rig park 跳过,是 daemon 内多 rig 工作流协调器。
classes.description_en: Constructs the ConvoyManager — drives cross-rig convoy lifecycle via event polling and a periodic stranded scan, with lazy store init and parked-rig skipping, the daemon's multi-rig workflow coordinator.

classes.name: EnsureLifecycleConfigFile
classes.description_zh: 由 gt init/gt up 调用,加载(或新建)巡逻配置文件、为未配置的巡逻项补全生命周期默认值并保存,确保 daemon watchdog 巡逻有完整可用的配置。
classes.description_en: Called by gt init/gt up to load (or create) the patrol config file, fill in lifecycle defaults for any unconfigured patrols and save it, ensuring the daemon's watchdog patrol has a complete usable config.

classes.name: IsPaused
classes.description_zh: 读取 town 的 Deacon 暂停文件判断跨 rig 监督者是否处于暂停态(暂停时不得执行任何巡逻动作),文件不存在即视为未暂停,是 Deacon 巡逻的总闸状态查询。
classes.description_en: Reads the town's Deacon pause file to report whether the cross-rig supervisor is paused (it must take no patrol actions while paused), treating a missing file as not-paused — the master gate check for Deacon patrols.

classes.name: HandleMRInfoSuccess
classes.description_zh: 处理一次成功合并:释放合并槽(merge slot)、用 merge_commit 与 close_reason 更新并关闭 MR bead、强制关闭其源 issue,完成 Refinery Engineer 单个 MR 成功路径的收尾。
classes.description_en: Handles a successful merge — releases the merge slot, updates and closes the MR bead with merge_commit and close_reason, and force-closes its source issue, finalizing the Refinery Engineer's success path for a single MR.

classes.signature: func (m *SessionManager) Start(polecat string, opts SessionStartOptions) error

classes.signature: func AssessActiveMR(reader IssueReader, in ActiveMRInput) ActiveMRAssessment

classes.signature: func (m *Manager) Start(name string, opts StartOptions) error

classes.signature: func (m *Manager) Start(foreground bool, agentOverride string, envOverrides []string) error

classes.signature: func Redispatch(townRoot, beadID, sourceRig string, maxAttempts int, cooldown time.Duration) *RedispatchResult

classes.name: Start
classes.signature: func (m *Manager) Start(foreground bool, agentOverride string) error

classes.signature: func Pause(townRoot, reason, pausedBy string) error

classes.name: TouchSessionHeartbeatWithState
classes.signature: func TouchSessionHeartbeatWithState(townRoot, sessionName string, state HeartbeatState, context, bead string)

classes.signature: func NukePolecat(bd *BdCli, workDir, rigName, polecatName string) error

classes.signature: func FeedStranded(townRoot string, maxPerCycle int, cooldown time.Duration) *FeedResult

classes.signature: func (m *NotificationManager) RecordSend(session, slot, message string) error

classes.name: Deactivate
classes.signature: func Deactivate(townRoot string, onlyAuto bool) error

classes.signature: func (m *SessionManager) Start(dogName string, opts SessionStartOptions) error

classes.name: SendIfReady
classes.signature: func (m *NotificationManager) SendIfReady(session, slot, message string) (bool, error)

classes.name: UpdateCleanupWispState
classes.signature: func UpdateCleanupWispState(bd *BdCli, workDir, wispID, newState string) error

classes.name: SetAgentStateWithRetry
classes.signature: func (m *Manager) SetAgentStateWithRetry(name string, state string) error

classes.name: RejectMR
classes.signature: func (m *Manager) RejectMR(idOrBranch string, reason string, notify bool) (*MergeRequest, error)

classes.name: Activate
classes.signature: func Activate(townRoot, trigger, reason string) error

classes.name: AppendToCustomTheme

layers.name: Work Tracking
layers.summary_zh: 工作状态域:Convoy/Beads/Formula/Wisp/Wasteland 与邮箱通知
layers.summary_en: the work-state domain: Convoy/Beads/Formula/Wisp/Wasteland and mailbox notification

classes.name: Join
classes.signature: func (s *Service) Join(upstream, forkOrg, token, handle, displayName, ownerEmail, gtVersion, townRoot string) (*Config, error)
classes.description_zh: 编排 Wasteland 联邦协作的加入流程(fork→clone→加上游→注册 rig→push→存配置),将本地 rig 接入 DoltHub 共享的工作协调网络。
classes.description_en: Orchestrates the Wasteland join workflow (fork -> clone -> add upstream -> register rig -> push -> save config) that enrolls a local rig into the DoltHub-federated work-coordination network.

classes.name: ResolveBeadsDir
classes.description_zh: 解析工作目录对应的 .beads 数据库位置,跟随 redirect 文件链(带循环与深度防护)以让 crew/polecat 等共享 rig 级 beads 工单库。
classes.description_en: Resolves which .beads database a work directory uses by following redirect-file chains (with circular and depth guards) so crew and polecat workers share the rig-level beads ledger.

classes.name: Parse
classes.description_zh: 将 formula.toml 字节内容解码为 Formula 工作流模板对象并推断类型、校验,作为 Formula/Molecule 工作流定义的解析入口。
classes.description_en: Decodes formula.toml bytes into a validated Formula workflow-template object with inferred type, serving as the parse entry point for Formula/Molecule workflow definitions.

classes.name: Create
classes.description_zh: 在 bd 工单账本中创建一条新 issue(bead),按前缀路由到正确数据库并填充 actor 溯源,是工作项落入 beads 跟踪体系的核心入口。
classes.description_en: Creates a new issue (bead) in the bd ledger, routing it to the correct prefix database and stamping actor provenance, as the core entry point for landing a work item into beads tracking.

classes.name: Drain
classes.description_zh: 以 FIFO 顺序原子领取并清空某 session 排队的 nudge 通知(rename-then-process 防重复、丢弃过期项),供 agent hook 在回合边界拉取待办提醒。
classes.description_en: Atomically claims and drains a session's queued nudge notifications in FIFO order (rename-then-process to avoid duplicates, dropping expired ones) for the agent hook to pick up at turn boundaries.

classes.name: Send
classes.description_zh: Agent 邮件投递的中央路由,按收件地址类型(mailing list/queue/announce/channel/@group/单收件人)分发到正确的 beads 信箱并扇出。
classes.description_en: Central routing for agent mail delivery, dispatching a message by recipient-address type (mailing list, queue, announce, channel, @group, or single recipient) into the correct beads mailbox with fan-out.

classes.name: Enqueue
classes.signature: func Enqueue(townRoot, session string, nudge QueuedNudge) error
classes.description_zh: 向某 session 的 nudge 队列写入一条带优先级与 TTL 过期的通知文件(超过 MaxQueueDepth 则拒绝),用于向 agent 投递异步提醒。
classes.description_en: Writes a priority- and TTL-stamped notification file into a session's nudge queue (rejecting beyond MaxQueueDepth) to deliver an asynchronous reminder to an agent.

classes.name: ProvisionFormulas
classes.description_zh: 在 gt install 时把内置的工作流 formula 模板部署到 .beads/formulas/ 目录(已存在则跳过)并记录哈希,为工作流实例化备好模板库。
classes.description_en: Provisions the embedded workflow formula templates into .beads/formulas/ during gt install (skipping existing ones) and records their hashes, seeding the template library for workflow instantiation.

classes.name: CommandContext
classes.signature: func CommandContext(ctx context.Context, dir, fallbackBeadsDir string, mode SubprocessEnvMode, args ...string) *exec.Cmd
classes.description_zh: 构建受 context 约束、套用 Gas Town 统一环境策略的 bd 子进程命令,是 beads 工单层调用外部 bd CLI 的标准化执行封装。
classes.description_en: Builds a context-bound bd subprocess command with Gas Town's shared environment policy, the standardized exec wrapper through which the beads layer invokes the external bd CLI.

classes.name: LoadRoutes
classes.description_zh: 从某 beads 目录读取 routes.jsonl 前缀路由表(容错跳过坏行),供工单 ID 按前缀解析到对应 rig 数据库的多库路由使用。
classes.description_en: Loads the routes.jsonl prefix routing table from a beads directory (tolerantly skipping malformed lines), backing the multi-database routing that maps bead-ID prefixes to rig databases.

classes.name: EnsureCustomTypes
classes.description_zh: 幂等地为目标 beads 数据库配置 Gas Town 自定义工单类型(用 sentinel 文件与内存缓存检测过期),确保 agent/rig/convoy 等 bead 类型可被创建。
classes.description_en: Idempotently configures Gas Town's custom bead types in a target beads database (using a sentinel file and in-memory cache to detect staleness), ensuring agent/rig/convoy bead types can be created.

classes.name: GetPrefixForRig
classes.description_zh: 按 rig 名查出其 beads 工单前缀(在 routes.jsonl 中匹配路径,回退到 config),用于将工作项归属到正确 rig 的账本命名空间。
classes.description_en: Looks up a rig's beads prefix by name (matching its path in routes.jsonl, falling back to config), used to attribute work items to the correct rig's ledger namespace.

classes.name: WriteRoutes
classes.description_zh: 以临时文件+原子 rename 的方式将前缀路由表覆盖写入 routes.jsonl,持久化工单 ID 前缀到 rig 数据库的多库路由映射。
classes.description_en: Writes the prefix routing table to routes.jsonl via temp-file-and-atomic-rename, persisting the multi-database mapping from bead-ID prefixes to rig databases.

classes.name: GetAgentBead
classes.description_zh: 按 ID 取回 agent bead 并解析出其 AgentFields 与 agent 状态,是读取单个 agent 工作状态记录(身份、状态、通知级别)的查询入口。
classes.description_en: Retrieves an agent bead by ID and parses its AgentFields and agent state, the query entry point for reading a single agent's work-state record (identity, state, notification level).

classes.name: ResolveBeadsDirForID
classes.description_zh: 根据 bead ID 的前缀经 routes.jsonl 解析出该工单实际所在的 rig beads 目录,实现跨数据库的工单定位。
classes.description_en: Resolves which rig beads directory a bead actually lives in by routing its ID prefix through routes.jsonl, enabling cross-database bead lookup.

classes.name: ToMessage
classes.description_zh: 将底层 beads 工单形式的消息(BeadsMessage)转换为统一的 mail Message,映射优先级、类型、CC、投递确认状态等字段以衔接 beads 账本与邮件域。
classes.description_en: Converts a beads-backed message (BeadsMessage) into the unified mail Message, mapping priority, type, CC, and delivery-ack fields to bridge the beads ledger and the mail domain.

classes.name: ForceCloseWithReason
classes.description_zh: 带 --force 强制关闭工单、绕过依赖检查并附原因,供 gt done 在 polecat 即将被销毁、未决 molecule wisp 不应阻塞收尾时关闭工作项。
classes.description_en: Force-closes beads with --force and a reason, bypassing dependency checks, used by gt done to close work items when a polecat is about to be nuked and open molecule wisps must not block closure.

classes.name: ParseAttachmentFields
classes.description_zh: 从 issue 描述的 key: value 行中解析出附挂工作流字段(attached_molecule/formula、convoy_id、merge_strategy、formula_vars 等),连接工单与其挂载的 Molecule/Formula/Convoy。
classes.description_en: Parses workflow attachment fields (attached_molecule/formula, convoy_id, merge_strategy, formula_vars, etc.) from an issue's key: value description lines, linking a bead to its attached Molecule/Formula/Convoy.

classes.name: NewRouter
classes.description_zh: 构造一个 mail Router(自动从 workDir 探测 town root 并绑定 tmux),是 agent 信箱投递子系统的实例化入口。
classes.description_en: Constructs a mail Router (auto-detecting town root from workDir and binding tmux), the instantiation entry point for the agent-mailbox delivery subsystem.

classes.name: CreateAgentBead
classes.signature: func (b *Beads) CreateAgentBead(id, title string, fields *AgentFields) (*Issue, error)
classes.description_zh: 为指定 agent 创建带 AgentFields 的身份/状态 bead(先确保目标库自定义类型已配置、含重试),是 agent 工作状态记录写入 beads 的核心入口。
classes.description_en: Creates an identity/state bead carrying AgentFields for a given agent (first ensuring custom types are configured on the target database, with retry), the core entry point for writing an agent's work-state record into beads.

classes.name: UpdateFormulas
classes.signature: func UpdateFormulas(beadsPath string) (updated, skipped, reinstalled int, err error)
classes.description_zh: 将可安全更新的工作流 formula 模板(过期/缺失/未跟踪)刷新为内置版本,同时跳过用户改过的模板,返回 updated/skipped/reinstalled 计数以维护模板库一致性。
classes.description_en: Refreshes the safely-updatable workflow formula templates (outdated/missing/untracked) to their embedded versions while skipping user-modified ones, returning updated/skipped/reinstalled counts to keep the template library consistent.

classes.name: RunSpiderDetection
classes.signature: func RunSpiderDetection(doltPath, forkDir string, cfg SpiderConfig) ([]FraudSignal, error)
classes.description_zh: 对本地 dolt fork 运行一组反作弊检测查询(合谋、橡皮图章、置信度灌水、自环),返回欺诈信号供联邦工作协调中给各 rig 评风险分。
classes.description_en: Runs a suite of fraud-detection queries (collusion, rubber-stamp, confidence-inflation, self-loop) against a local dolt fork and returns fraud signals for risk-scoring rigs in federated work coordination.

classes.name: CheckFormulaHealth
classes.description_zh: 比对内置、已安装记录与磁盘当前哈希,报告每个工作流 formula 模板的状态(ok/outdated/modified/missing/untracked),作为模板库健康巡检。
classes.description_en: Compares embedded, installed-record, and on-disk hashes to report each workflow formula template's status (ok/outdated/modified/missing/untracked), a health check over the template library.

classes.name: EnsureCustomStatuses
classes.description_zh: 幂等地为目标 beads 数据库配置 Gas Town 自定义工单状态(同样用内存+sentinel 两级缓存检测过期),保证工作流所需的自定义状态可用。
classes.description_en: Idempotently configures Gas Town's custom bead statuses in a target beads database (using the same two-level in-memory + sentinel caching to detect staleness), ensuring workflow-required custom statuses are available.

classes.name: Pending
classes.description_zh: 统计某 session 队列中待处理 nudge 的近似数量(只数 .json 文件、不读内容),供入队限流与状态展示判断队列深度。
classes.description_en: Returns the approximate count of pending nudges in a session's queue (counting .json files without reading them), used for enqueue throttling and status display of queue depth.

classes.name: SetupRedirect
classes.description_zh: 为 worktree 创建 .beads/redirect 文件指向 rig 级 beads(计算相对路径、清理运行时文件、拒绝在正规位置建链),让 crew/refinery 等 worktree 共享同一工单账本。
classes.description_en: Creates a worktree's .beads/redirect file pointing to the rig-level beads (computing the relative path, cleaning runtime files, refusing chains at the canonical location) so crew/refinery worktrees share one bead ledger.

classes.name: CheckConvoysForIssue
classes.signature: func CheckConvoysForIssue(ctx context.Context, store beadsdk.Storage, townRoot, issueID, caller string, logger func(format string, args ...interface{}), gtPath string, isRigParked func(string) bool, resolver ...*StoreResolver) []string
classes.description_zh: 当某 issue 关闭后,找出跟踪它的 Convoy 工作单元并对每个未关闭/已启动的 convoy 触发完成检查,再反应式喂入下一个就绪 issue,实现事件驱动的 convoy 推进。
classes.description_en: On an issue's closure, finds the Convoy work-units tracking it and runs a completion check for each open, launched convoy, then reactively feeds the next ready issue, driving event-driven convoy progression.

classes.name: NewMessage
classes.signature: func NewMessage(from, to, subject, body string) *Message
classes.description_zh: 构造一条带生成 ID 与 thread ID 的新 mail Message(默认正常优先级、notification 类型),是 agent 间发送通知/消息的工厂入口。
classes.description_en: Constructs a new mail Message with a generated ID and thread ID (defaulting to normal priority and notification type), the factory entry point for sending notifications/messages between agents.

classes.name: CloseWithReason
classes.description_zh: 按原因关闭一个或多个工单,并在环境中存在 session ID 时透传给 bd close 以记录工作量归属,是正常工作项收尾路径。
classes.description_en: Closes one or more beads with a reason, passing the environment's session ID to bd close for work attribution when present, the normal work-item completion path.

classes.name: ParseMoleculeSteps
classes.description_zh: 把 Molecule 描述文本按 "## Step:" 标记解析为有序的 MoleculeStep 列表(提取 Needs/Tier/Type/Backoff 等),将工作流模板展开为可跟踪的步骤。
classes.description_en: Parses Molecule description text by "## Step:" markers into an ordered list of MoleculeStep (extracting Needs/Tier/Type/Backoff), expanding a workflow template into trackable steps.

classes.name: ResolveHookDir
classes.signature: func ResolveHookDir(townRoot, beadID, hookWorkDir string) string
classes.description_zh: 根据 bead 前缀解析出运行 bd update 应使用的实际 rig 目录(bd update 不支持路由/redirect 时的必要回退),保证工单钩子在正确数据库目录执行。
classes.description_en: Resolves the actual rig directory to run bd update in based on a bead's prefix (a necessary fallback since bd update doesn't support routing/redirects), ensuring bead hooks run against the correct database directory.

classes.name: ParseMRFields
classes.description_zh: 从 issue 描述中解析出结构化的合并请求(merge-request)字段(branch、target、commit_sha、convoy_id、pre_verified 等),供 mq 合并流程读取 MR 工单元数据。
classes.description_en: Parses structured merge-request fields (branch, target, commit_sha, convoy_id, pre_verified, etc.) from an issue's description for the mq merge flow to read MR bead metadata.

classes.name: NewConfig
classes.description_zh: 为指定 rig 构造 wisp 配置对象(定位 town 下的 per-rig 配置文件路径),作为短暂工作单元 wisp 配置读写的句柄。
classes.description_en: Constructs a wisp Config for a given rig (locating the per-rig config file path under the town), serving as the handle for reading/writing the ephemeral-work-unit wisp configuration.

classes.name: ParseAgentBeadID
classes.signature: func ParseAgentBeadID(id string) (rig, role, name string, ok bool)
classes.description_zh: 将 agent bead ID 解析为 (rig, role, name) 三元组,处理塌缩前缀、命名角色与含连字符的 rig 名等多种形态,是 agent 工作身份标识的解码器。
classes.description_en: Parses an agent bead ID into its (rig, role, name) components, handling collapsed prefixes, named roles, and hyphenated rig names, the decoder for agent work-identity identifiers.

classes.name: CreateRigBead
classes.description_zh: 创建跟踪 rig 元数据的身份 bead(ID 形如 <prefix>-rig-<name>,校验 rig 状态并先确保自定义类型),将一个 rig 注册进 beads 工作状态体系。
classes.description_en: Creates a rig-identity bead tracking rig metadata (ID like <prefix>-rig-<name>, validating rig state and first ensuring custom types), registering a rig into the beads work-state system.

classes.name: AcknowledgeDeliveryBead
classes.signature: func AcknowledgeDeliveryBead(workDir, beadsDir, beadID, recipientIdentity string) error
classes.description_zh: 为某消息 bead 打上投递确认标签并在确认持久后移除 delivery:pending,实现 agent 邮件的可靠投递状态收敛(按前缀路由到正确数据库)。
classes.description_en: Stamps delivery-ack labels on a message bead and removes delivery:pending once the ack is durable, converging the reliable-delivery state of agent mail (routing by prefix to the correct database).

classes.name: ListMergeRequests
classes.description_zh: 同时查询 issues 表与 wisps 表(后者经 bd sql)汇总合并请求工单并去重,因 mq submit 把 MR 建为短暂 wisp 而 bd list 查不到,从而完整列出待处理 MR。
classes.description_en: Lists merge-request beads by querying both the issues table and the wisps table (the latter via bd sql) and deduplicating, since mq submit creates MRs as ephemeral wisps invisible to bd list, yielding the complete set of pending MRs.

classes.name: EmitToTown
classes.signature: func EmitToTown(townRoot, channel, eventType string, payloadPairs []string) (string, error)
classes.description_zh: 用显式 town root 在 events/<channel>/ 下写入一个事件文件(校验频道名),作为内部调用者向 town 频道发布 channelevents 事件的入口。
classes.description_en: Emits an event file under events/<channel>/ using an explicit town root (validating the channel name), the entry point for internal callers to publish channelevents to a town channel.

classes.name: UpdateAgentDescriptionFields
classes.signature: func (b *Beads) UpdateAgentDescriptionFields(id string, updates AgentFieldUpdates) error
classes.description_zh: 在单次 Show-Parse-Modify-Update 周期内原子更新 agent bead 的若干描述字段(校验通知级别等),避免并发更新不同字段时相互覆盖,安全维护 agent 工作状态。
classes.description_en: Atomically updates several of an agent bead's description fields in a single Show-Parse-Modify-Update cycle (validating notification level, etc.), preventing concurrent updates of different fields from overwriting each other while safely maintaining agent work-state.
