layers.name: Agent Runtime
layers.summary_zh: 驱动各 AI 运行时:会话、ACP/协议代理、插件与配额
layers.summary_en: drives the AI runtimes: sessions, ACP/protocol proxy, plugins and quota

classes.name: Stat
classes.description_zh: LocalConnection 对 Connection 抽象的 Stat 实现,在本地执行上下文中返回文件元信息并将系统错误归一化为连接层的 NotFound/Permission 错误。
classes.description_en: LocalConnection's Stat implementation of the Connection abstraction, returning file metadata for local execution while normalizing OS errors into connection-layer NotFound/Permission errors.

classes.name: MkdirAll
classes.signature: func (c *LocalConnection) MkdirAll(path string, perm fs.FileMode) error
classes.description_zh: LocalConnection 的 MkdirAll 实现,为本地 rig 操作创建目录树,并把权限错误包装成统一的 PermissionError。
classes.description_en: LocalConnection's MkdirAll implementation that creates directory trees for local rig operations, wrapping permission failures into the unified PermissionError.

classes.name: ReadFile
classes.description_zh: LocalConnection 的 ReadFile 实现,在本地读取文件并将不存在/权限错误统一为连接层错误,使本地与远程 rig 共用同一文件访问接口。
classes.description_en: LocalConnection's ReadFile implementation that reads a file locally and maps missing/permission errors to connection-layer errors, letting local and remote rigs share one file-access interface.

classes.name: HasPrefix
classes.description_zh: PrefixRegistry 方法,判断一个 tmux 会话名是否以某个已注册 rig 前缀加短横线开头,用于识别属于 Gas Town 的 agent 会话。
classes.description_en: PrefixRegistry method that reports whether a tmux session name starts with a registered rig prefix plus a dash, used to recognize Gas Town agent sessions.

classes.name: PrefixFor
classes.description_zh: 便捷函数,通过默认 PrefixRegistry 返回某 rig 的 beads 前缀(未知则返回 DefaultPrefix),供会话命名与解析统一取用。
classes.description_en: Convenience function returning a rig's beads prefix via the default PrefixRegistry (falling back to DefaultPrefix), shared by session naming and parsing.

classes.name: EnsureSettingsForRole
classes.signature: func EnsureSettingsForRole(settingsDir, workDir, role string, rc *config.RuntimeConfig) error
classes.description_zh: 运行时集成入口,按 RuntimeConfig 为某角色安装 provider 专属 hooks 设置(如 .claude/settings.json)、Gemini 上下文文件与斜杠命令,使各底层 AI runtime 启动前配置就绪。
classes.description_en: Runtime-integration entrypoint that provisions provider-specific hook settings (e.g. .claude/settings.json), the Gemini context file, and slash commands for a role per RuntimeConfig, readying each underlying AI runtime before launch.

classes.name: IsDir
classes.description_zh: BasicFileInfo 的 IsDir 实现,为可跨 SSH 序列化的 FileInfo 抽象提供目录判定,支撑远程 rig 文件操作。
classes.description_en: BasicFileInfo's IsDir implementation, providing the directory check for the SSH-serializable FileInfo abstraction that backs remote rig file operations.

classes.name: RemoveAll
classes.description_zh: LocalConnection 的 RemoveAll 实现,递归删除本地文件或目录并归一化权限错误,服务于本地 rig 清理操作。
classes.description_en: LocalConnection's RemoveAll implementation that recursively deletes local files or directories and normalizes permission errors, serving local rig cleanup.

classes.name: SetDefaultRegistry
classes.description_zh: 并发安全地替换包级默认 PrefixRegistry,使进程内所有会话名解析使用新加载的 rig 前缀映射。
classes.description_en: Concurrency-safely replaces the package-level default PrefixRegistry so all in-process session-name parsing uses the freshly loaded rig prefix map.

classes.name: InitRegistry
classes.description_zh: 进程启动早期的注册初始化:从 town 的 rigs.json 构建默认 PrefixRegistry、设定 per-town tmux socket 并加载 agents.json agent 注册表,使 CLI/守护进程/witness 各入口对会话与 agent 解析保持一致。
classes.description_en: Early-lifecycle registry init that builds the default PrefixRegistry from the town's rigs.json, sets the per-town tmux socket, and loads the agents.json registry so CLI/daemon/witness entry points resolve sessions and agents consistently.

classes.name: PlanRotation
classes.signature: func PlanRotation(scanner *Scanner, mgr *Manager, acctCfg *config.AccountsConfig, opts PlanOpts) (*RotatePlan, error)
classes.description_zh: 配额轮换核心规划器,扫描限流/近限的 agent 会话、校验可用账号 token,并按 config dir 计算账号换绑方案(每 config dir 一次 keychain 交换),产出可审阅的 RotatePlan。
classes.description_en: Core quota-rotation planner that scans rate-limited/near-limit agent sessions, validates available account tokens, and computes per-config-dir account reassignments (one keychain swap per config dir), producing a reviewable RotatePlan.

classes.name: Equal
classes.description_zh: Address 方法,在归一化本地机器名后比较两个 [machine:]rig/polecat 地址是否等价,用于 agent/rig 寻址判等。
classes.description_en: Address method that compares two [machine:]rig/polecat addresses for equivalence after normalizing the local-machine name, used in agent/rig address matching.

classes.name: SyncPlugins
classes.signature: func SyncPlugins(sourceDir, targetDir string, clean bool) (*SyncResult, error)
classes.description_zh: 插件系统同步器,按内容哈希将源目录中的插件目录复制/更新到目标运行时目录(可选 clean 删除多余项),返回 copied/removed/skipped 结果。
classes.description_en: Plugin-system synchronizer that content-hashes and copies/updates plugin directories from a source into the target runtime directory (optionally cleaning stragglers), returning copied/removed/skipped results.

classes.name: ParseSessionName
classes.description_zh: 用默认 PrefixRegistry 将 tmux 会话名解析为 AgentIdentity(角色/rig/名称),是会话名→agent 身份解析的便捷入口。
classes.description_en: Parses a tmux session name into an AgentIdentity (role/rig/name) using the default PrefixRegistry, the convenience entrypoint for session-name-to-agent resolution.

classes.name: NewRecorder
classes.description_zh: 构造插件运行 Recorder,绑定 town 根目录以便后续将插件执行结果记录为 beads 账本条目。
classes.description_en: Constructs a plugin-run Recorder bound to the town root for later recording of plugin execution outcomes as beads ledger entries.

classes.name: Exec
classes.description_zh: LocalConnection 的 Exec 实现,在本地直接运行命令并返回合并输出,为底层 runtime/工具调用提供本地执行后端。
classes.description_en: LocalConnection's Exec implementation that runs a command locally and returns combined output, providing the local execution backend for underlying runtime/tool invocations.

classes.name: GenerateCA
classes.description_zh: 为沙箱化 polecat 执行生成自签名 mTLS CA 证书与私钥并原子写盘,是 gt-proxy 签发服务端/客户端证书的信任根。
classes.description_en: Generates and atomically writes a self-signed mTLS CA cert+key for sandboxed polecat execution, the trust root from which the gt-proxy issues server/client certificates.

classes.name: NewProxy
classes.description_zh: 构造 ACP Proxy,初始化握手状态机与 stdin/stdout 编码器,用于在 gt 与底层 agent 间转发 Agent Client Protocol 的 JSON-RPC 消息。
classes.description_en: Constructs the ACP Proxy, initializing its handshake state machine and stdin/stdout encoder for forwarding Agent Client Protocol JSON-RPC messages between gt and the underlying agent.

classes.name: Addr
classes.description_zh: gt-proxy Server 方法,返回其监听套接字地址,供 polecat 容器在启动后连接代理。
classes.description_en: gt-proxy Server method returning its listening socket address, so polecat containers can connect to the proxy once it has bound.

classes.name: Forward
classes.description_zh: ACP Proxy 主循环,启动双向消息转发与 keepalive、监控 PID 文件并等待 agent 进程退出,统一处理信号与优雅关停,是 ACP 转发的运行核心。
classes.description_en: The ACP Proxy main loop that launches bidirectional message forwarding and keepalive, monitors the PID file, and awaits agent-process exit while handling signals and graceful shutdown — the runtime core of ACP forwarding.

classes.name: KillTrackedPIDs
classes.description_zh: 关停时的孤儿清理:读取 .runtime/pids 下所有 PID 跟踪文件,校验进程身份(防 PID 复用)后 SIGTERM 杀掉幸存的 agent 进程并清理文件。
classes.description_en: Shutdown orphan-cleanup that reads all PID tracking files under .runtime/pids, verifies process identity (guarding against PID reuse), and SIGTERMs surviving agent processes while removing their tracking files.

classes.name: NewPrefixRegistry
classes.description_zh: 构造一个空的 PrefixRegistry,持有 prefix↔rig 双向映射,作为会话名解析与命名的基础容器。
classes.description_en: Constructs an empty PrefixRegistry holding the bidirectional prefix↔rig map, the base container for session-name parsing and naming.

classes.name: DefaultRegistry
classes.description_zh: 并发安全地返回包级默认 PrefixRegistry,是各便捷函数解析会话名时的全局 rig 前缀来源。
classes.description_en: Concurrency-safely returns the package-level default PrefixRegistry, the global source of rig prefixes used by convenience functions when parsing session names.

classes.name: IsKnownSession
classes.description_zh: 判断一个 tmux 会话名是否属于 Gas Town(匹配 hq- 前缀或默认注册表中的 rig 前缀),用于在全部 tmux 会话中筛出本系统的 agent 会话。
classes.description_en: Reports whether a tmux session name belongs to Gas Town (matching the hq- prefix or a registered rig prefix), used to filter the system's agent sessions out of all tmux sessions.

classes.name: BuildPrefixRegistryFromTown
classes.description_zh: 从 town 的 rigs.json(优先 mayor/rigs.json,回退 town 根)构建并填充 PrefixRegistry,缺失时告警并返回空注册表,为会话名解析提供 rig 前缀映射。
classes.description_en: Builds and populates a PrefixRegistry from the town's rigs.json (preferring mayor/rigs.json, falling back to town root), warning and returning an empty registry if absent, to supply rig-prefix mappings for session parsing.

classes.name: DetectDrift
classes.description_zh: 比较源插件目录与运行时目标目录,按内容哈希报告漂移、缺失与多余的插件,用于检测已部署插件与源的不一致。
classes.description_en: Compares the source plugin directory against the runtime target directory, content-hashing to report drifted, missing, and extra plugins, detecting divergence between deployed plugins and their source.

classes.name: ScanAll
classes.description_zh: 配额 Scanner 方法,遍历所有 Gas Town tmux 会话并捕获面板末尾输出,检测限流/近限指示,产出供 PlanRotation 使用的扫描结果。
classes.description_en: Quota Scanner method that iterates all Gas Town tmux sessions, capturing pane tail output to detect rate-limit/near-limit indicators and produce the scan results consumed by PlanRotation.

classes.name: PolecatSessionName
classes.description_zh: 由 rig 前缀与名称拼出 polecat agent 的 tmux 会话名(<prefix>-<name>),是会话命名约定的一部分。
classes.description_en: Composes a polecat agent's tmux session name from its rig prefix and name (<prefix>-<name>), part of the session naming convention.

classes.name: CleanupLegacyDefaultSocket
classes.description_zh: 清理旧版二进制遗留在 "default" tmux socket 上的 Gas Town 会话,迁移到 per-town socket 后回收孤儿会话,返回清理数量。
classes.description_en: Cleans up Gas Town sessions left on the "default" tmux socket by older binaries, reclaiming orphans after migration to the per-town socket, and returns the count cleaned.

classes.name: ParseSessionNameWithRegistry
classes.description_zh: 用指定 PrefixRegistry 将 tmux 会话名解析为 AgentIdentity,先匹配 hq- 的 town 级角色(mayor/deacon/boot/overseer/dog),再按 rig 前缀解析 witness/refinery/crew/polecat。
classes.description_en: Parses a tmux session name into an AgentIdentity using a given PrefixRegistry, first matching hq- town-level roles (mayor/deacon/boot/overseer/dog) then resolving witness/refinery/crew/polecat by rig prefix.

classes.name: MergeRuntimeLivenessEnv
classes.description_zh: 在写入 tmux 会话环境表前,从 RuntimeConfig 补齐存活检测关键的 GT_AGENT 与 GT_PROCESS_NAMES 环境变量,确保 agent 进程可被正确识别与监控。
classes.description_en: Before writing the tmux session environment table, merges the liveness-critical GT_AGENT and GT_PROCESS_NAMES env vars from RuntimeConfig so the agent process can be correctly identified and monitored.

classes.name: TrackPID
classes.signature: func TrackPID(townRoot, sessionID string, pid int) error
classes.description_zh: 将 agent 会话的 PID(连同进程启动时间)写入 .runtime/pids 跟踪文件,作为关停清理孤儿进程的纵深防御。
classes.description_en: Writes an agent session's PID (with process start time) to a .runtime/pids tracking file as defense-in-depth for orphan-process cleanup at shutdown.

classes.name: Len
classes.description_zh: DenyList 方法,返回当前已吊销证书序列号集合的条目数,用于 gt-proxy mTLS 握手时的证书撤销检查。
classes.description_en: DenyList method returning the number of revoked certificate serial entries currently held, supporting gt-proxy's certificate-revocation checks during the mTLS handshake.

classes.name: IssuePolecat
classes.signature: func (ca *CA) IssuePolecat(cn string, ttl time.Duration) (certPEM, keyPEM []byte, err error)
classes.description_zh: CA 方法,为格式为 gt-<rig>-<name> 的 polecat 签发短期客户端认证叶子证书,使沙箱化 polecat 能以 mTLS 客户端身份连接 gt-proxy。
classes.description_en: CA method that issues a short-lived client-auth leaf certificate for a polecat (CN gt-<rig>-<name>), letting a sandboxed polecat connect to the gt-proxy as an mTLS client.

classes.name: SessionIDFromEnv
classes.description_zh: 从环境变量解析当前 runtime 的会话 ID:先看 GT_SESSION_ID_ENV,再按当前 agent 预设的 SessionIDEnv,最后回退 CLAUDE_SESSION_ID,屏蔽不同底层 runtime 的会话 ID 命名差异。
classes.description_en: Resolves the current runtime's session ID from the environment — first GT_SESSION_ID_ENV, then the current agent preset's SessionIDEnv, finally falling back to CLAUDE_SESSION_ID — abstracting away each underlying runtime's session-ID naming.

classes.name: RecordAgentInstantiateFromDir
classes.signature: func RecordAgentInstantiateFromDir(ctx context.Context, runID, resolvedAgent, role, agentName, sessionID, rigName, townRoot, issueID, workDir string)
classes.description_zh: 在 agent 实例化时从工作目录解析 git 分支/提交,发出 agent.instantiate 根遥测事件(agentType 缺省 claudecode),作为 agent 生命周期追踪的根 span。
classes.description_en: On agent instantiation, resolves the git branch/commit from the work directory and emits the agent.instantiate root telemetry event (defaulting agentType to claudecode), serving as the root span for agent-lifecycle tracing.

classes.name: RefinerySessionName
classes.description_zh: 由 rig 前缀拼出 refinery agent 的 tmux 会话名(<prefix>-refinery),属于会话命名约定。
classes.description_en: Composes a refinery agent's tmux session name from its rig prefix (<prefix>-refinery), part of the session naming convention.

classes.name: WitnessSessionName
classes.description_zh: 由 rig 前缀拼出 witness agent 的 tmux 会话名(<prefix>-witness),属于会话命名约定。
classes.description_en: Composes a witness agent's tmux session name from its rig prefix (<prefix>-witness), part of the session naming convention.

classes.name: DiscoverAll
classes.description_zh: 插件 Scanner 方法,先扫描 town 级再扫描各 rig 级插件目录并按名称去重(rig 级覆盖 town 级),返回全部已发现插件。
classes.description_en: Plugin Scanner method that scans town-level then per-rig plugin directories and dedupes by name (rig-level overriding town-level), returning all discovered plugins.

classes.name: BuildStartupPrompt
classes.signature: func BuildStartupPrompt(cfg BeaconConfig, instructions string) string
classes.description_zh: 拼接启动信标(beacon)与指令,构造 agent 启动时注入的 CLI 提示,用于会话身份识别与立即开始工作(GUPP)。
classes.description_en: Concatenates the startup beacon with instructions to build the CLI prompt injected at agent startup, used for session identity discovery and immediate work kickoff (GUPP).

classes.name: DeliverStartupPromptFallback
classes.signature: func DeliverStartupPromptFallback( t startupPromptSession, sessionID, prompt string, rc *config.RuntimeConfig, timeout time.Duration, ) error

classes.name: TrackSessionPID
classes.signature: func TrackSessionPID(townRoot, sessionID string, t *tmux.Tmux) error

classes.name: InjectNotificationToUI
classes.signature: func (p *Proxy) InjectNotificationToUI(method string, params any) error

classes.name: StartSession
classes.signature: func StartSession(t *tmux.Tmux, cfg SessionConfig) (_ *StartResult, retErr error)

classes.name: NotifyMergeOutcome
classes.signature: func (h *DefaultRefineryHandler) NotifyMergeOutcome(polecat, branch, issue, targetBranch string, outcome MergeOutcome) error

classes.name: NewStateManager
classes.signature: func NewStateManager[T any](rigPath, stateFileName string, defaultFactory func() *T) *StateManager[T]

classes.name: BeaconRecipient
classes.signature: func BeaconRecipient(role, name, rig string) string

classes.name: NewReworkRequestMessage
classes.signature: func NewReworkRequestMessage(rig, polecat, branch, issue, targetBranch string, conflictFiles []string) *mail.Message

classes.name: NewRotator
classes.signature: func NewRotator( tmuxClient TmuxClient, tmuxExec TmuxExecutor, mgr *Manager, accounts *config.AccountsConfig, restartCmd func(string) (string, error), log Logger, townRoot string, agentName string, sessionLinker SessionLinker, ) *Rotator

classes.name: IssueServer
classes.signature: func (ca *CA) IssueServer(cn string, extraIPs []net.IP, extraDNSNames []string, ttl time.Duration) (certPEM, keyPEM []byte, err error)

classes.name: MarkLimited
classes.signature: func (m *Manager) MarkLimited(handle string, resetsAt string) error

classes.name: ParseResetTime
classes.signature: func ParseResetTime(resetsAt string, reference time.Time) (time.Time, error)

classes.name: RunStartupFallback
classes.signature: func RunStartupFallback(t *tmux.Tmux, sessionID, role string, rc *config.RuntimeConfig) error

classes.name: NewMergedMessage
classes.signature: func NewMergedMessage(rig, polecat, branch, issue, targetBranch, mergeCommit string) *mail.Message

classes.name: NewMergeFailedMessage
classes.signature: func NewMergeFailedMessage(rig, polecat, branch, issue, targetBranch, failureType, errorMsg string) *mail.Message

classes.name: Initialize
classes.signature: func (p *LocalProvider) Initialize(ctx context.Context, clientName, clientVersion string) (*InitializeResult, error)

classes.name: WriteKeychainToken
classes.display_name: internal.quota.quota.WriteKeychainToken func WriteKeychainToken(serviceName, accountLabel, token string) error
classes.signature: func WriteKeychainToken(serviceName, accountLabel, token string) error

classes.name: NewMergeReadyMessage
classes.signature: func NewMergeReadyMessage(rig, polecat, branch, issue string) *mail.Message

classes.name: NewFixNeededMessage
classes.signature: func NewFixNeededMessage(rig, polecat, branch, issue, targetBranch, failureType, errorMsg, mrBeadID string, attemptNumber int) *mail.Message

classes.name: SendMerged
classes.signature: func (h *DefaultRefineryHandler) SendMerged(polecat, branch, issue, targetBranch, mergeCommit string) error

classes.name: SendFixNeeded
classes.signature: func (h *DefaultRefineryHandler) SendFixNeeded(polecat, branch, issue, targetBranch, failureType, errorMsg, mrBeadID string, attemptNumber int) error

classes.name: SendReworkRequest
classes.signature: func (h *DefaultRefineryHandler) SendReworkRequest(polecat, branch, issue, targetBranch string, conflictFiles []string) error

classes.signature: func (p *LocalProvider) CallTool(ctx context.Context, name string, args map[string]any) (*CallToolResult, error)

classes.name: GetRunsSince
classes.signature: func (r *Recorder) GetRunsSince(pluginName string, since string) ([]*PluginRunBead, error)

classes.name: CountRunsSince
classes.signature: func (r *Recorder) CountRunsSince(pluginName string, since string) (int, error)

classes.name: ResolveSwapSourceDirs
classes.signature: func ResolveSwapSourceDirs(activeSwaps map[string]string, accounts map[string]config.Account) map[string]string

classes.name: WaitForSessionExit
classes.signature: func WaitForSessionExit(t *tmux.Tmux, sessionID string, timeout time.Duration) bool

classes.name: Watch
classes.signature: func (a *ClaudeCodeAdapter) Watch(ctx context.Context, sessionID, workDir string, since time.Time) (<-chan AgentEvent, error)

classes.name: SwapOAuthAccount
classes.display_name: internal.quota.quota.SwapOAuthAccount func SwapOAuthAccount(targetConfigDir, sourceConfigDir string) (json.RawMessage, error)

classes.name: parsePluginMD
classes.signature: func parsePluginMD(content []byte, pluginDir string, location Location, rigName string) (*Plugin, error)

layers.name: Workspace & Persistence
layers.summary_zh: git worktree 钩子、Dolt 服务、工作区与进程基础设施
layers.summary_en: git-worktree hooks, the Dolt server, workspace and process infrastructure

classes.name: FindFromCwdOrError
classes.description_zh: 从当前工作目录向上探测 Gas Town 工作区根目录，失败时回退到 GT_TOWN_ROOT/GT_ROOT 环境变量,是命令定位 town root 的主入口。
classes.description_en: Locates the Gas Town workspace root upward from the current working directory, falling back to the GT_TOWN_ROOT/GT_ROOT env vars, serving as the primary entry point for commands resolving the town root.

classes.name: NewTmux
classes.description_zh: 创建绑定到本镇 tmux socket(或 GT_TOWN_SOCKET 回退)的 Tmux 封装器,确保会话操作命中正确的隔离 tmux 服务器。
classes.description_en: Creates a Tmux wrapper bound to the town's tmux socket (or the GT_TOWN_SOCKET fallback) so session operations target the correct isolated tmux server.

classes.name: FindFromCwd
classes.description_zh: 读取当前工作目录并向上查找工作区根目录,是 FindFromCwdOrError 不带环境变量回退的轻量版本。
classes.description_en: Reads the current working directory and walks upward to find the workspace root, a lightweight variant of FindFromCwdOrError without env-var fallback.

classes.name: ResolveSessionTheme
classes.signature: func ResolveSessionTheme(townRoot, rigName, role, crewMember string) *Theme
classes.description_zh: 按 rig 设置→town 配置→角色内置主题的优先级层级解析某 tmux 会话的配色主题,nil 表示显式禁用主题。
classes.description_en: Resolves a tmux session's color theme through a precedence chain of rig settings, town config, and built-in role themes, with nil signaling theming is explicitly disabled.

classes.name: NewGit
classes.description_zh: 为指定工作目录构造 Git 封装器,是所有 git 子进程操作(worktree、commit、branch)的统一句柄。
classes.description_en: Constructs a Git wrapper for a given working directory, the unified handle for all git subprocess operations (worktree, commit, branch).

classes.name: Lock
classes.description_zh: 代表某 worker 目录的代理身份锁结构体,锁文件落在 <worker>/.runtime/agent.lock,防止多个代理抢占同一身份。
classes.description_en: Struct representing a per-worker agent identity lock, backed by a lock file at <worker>/.runtime/agent.lock to prevent multiple agents from claiming the same identity.

classes.name: DefaultConfig
classes.description_zh: 依据 town root、config.yaml、daemon.json 及一系列 GT_DOLT_* 环境变量按优先级组装 Dolt SQL 服务器的运行配置(端口、数据目录、PID/日志文件等)。
classes.description_en: Assembles the Dolt SQL server's runtime Config (port, data dir, PID/log files, etc.) by layering town-root defaults, config.yaml, daemon.json, and the GT_DOLT_* environment variables in precedence order.

classes.name: ListDatabases
classes.description_zh: 枚举本镇的所有 Dolt 数据库:远程服务器走缓存查询,本地则扫描 .dolt-data 数据目录。
classes.description_en: Enumerates all of the town's Dolt databases, via a cached query for remote servers or a filesystem scan of the .dolt-data directory for local ones.

classes.name: Find
classes.description_zh: 从给定目录向上行走、用 mayor/town.json 主标记定位最外层工作区根目录,正确处理嵌套 worktree/rig 结构。
classes.description_en: Walks upward from a given directory using the mayor/town.json marker to locate the outermost workspace root, correctly handling nested worktree/rig structures.

classes.name: RemoveDatabase
classes.signature: func RemoveDatabase(townRoot, dbName string, force bool) error
classes.description_zh: 安全删除某个 Dolt 数据库:先拒绝受保护的共享库,再用 SQL/磁盘大小启发式校验非空才需 --force,运行中还会 DROP DATABASE 并清理分支控制项。
classes.description_en: Safely removes a Dolt database, refusing protected shared databases, guarding non-empty databases behind --force via SQL/disk-size heuristics, and running DROP DATABASE plus branch-control cleanup when the server is live.

classes.name: InitRig
classes.signature: func InitRig(townRoot, rigName string) (serverWasRunning bool, created bool, err error)
classes.description_zh: 为某个 rig 幂等地初始化其 Dolt 数据库目录与 metadata,处理服务器在线/孤儿状态并修复 issue_prefix,返回是否已运行及是否新建。
classes.description_en: Idempotently initializes a rig's Dolt database directory and metadata, handling running/orphaned server states and repairing issue_prefix, returning whether the server was running and whether the database was newly created.

classes.name: ComputeExpected
classes.description_zh: 为某个 hooks 目标按特异性逐层合并基础配置(DefaultBase 兜底)与内置/磁盘上的覆盖项,算出该目标应有的 HooksConfig。
classes.description_en: Computes the expected HooksConfig for a target by layering the base config (with DefaultBase as floor) and the built-in plus on-disk overrides in order of specificity.

classes.name: FindMigratableDatabases
classes.description_zh: 扫描旧式 per-rig .beads/dolt 布局下可迁移到集中 .dolt-data 目录的 town 级与 rig 级 Dolt 数据库,产出迁移清单。
classes.description_en: Scans for legacy per-rig .beads/dolt databases (town-level and rig-level) that can be migrated into the centralized .dolt-data directory, producing a list of Migration entries.

classes.name: NewSession
classes.description_zh: 在工作目录中创建一个分离(detached)的 tmux 会话,并设置 window-size=latest 以便客户端附着时自动调整窗口大小。
classes.description_en: Creates a detached tmux session in a working directory, setting window-size=latest so the window auto-resizes when a client later attaches.

classes.name: DiscoverTargets
classes.description_zh: 遍历工作区,发现所有受 Gas Town 管理的 .claude/settings.json 目标(mayor/deacon/boot 及各 rig 的 crew/polecats/witness/refinery),返回带角色与 rig 信息的目标列表。
classes.description_en: Walks the workspace to discover all Gas Town-managed .claude/settings.json targets (mayor/deacon/boot and each rig's crew/polecats/witness/refinery), returning Target structs with role and rig info.

classes.name: FindOrphanedDatabases
classes.description_zh: 对比磁盘上的 Dolt 数据库与各 metadata.json 引用的库名,找出存在于磁盘却无任何 rig 引用的孤儿数据库及其占用大小。
classes.description_en: Compares on-disk Dolt databases against the database names referenced by metadata.json files to find orphaned databases that exist on disk but are referenced by no rig, reporting their sizes.

classes.name: SyncForRole
classes.signature: func SyncForRole(provider, settingsDir, workDir, role, hooksDir, hooksFile string, useSettingsDir bool) (SyncResult, error)
classes.description_zh: 将基于模板的代理(OpenCode/Copilot/Pi 等)的 hooks/settings 文件与当前模板比对,内容不一致则原子写覆盖,返回创建/更新/未变更结果。
classes.description_en: Compares a template-based agent's (OpenCode/Copilot/Pi, etc.) deployed hooks/settings file against the current template and atomically overwrites on mismatch, returning a created/updated/unchanged SyncResult.

classes.name: InstallForRole
classes.signature: func InstallForRole(provider, settingsDir, workDir, role, hooksDir, hooksFile string, useSettingsDir bool) error
classes.description_zh: 按代理预设在角色目录中布设 hooks/settings 文件:不存在则创建,含已知陈旧模式则升级覆盖,否则保留——会话启动时的安全安装路径。
classes.description_en: Provisions an agent's hooks/settings file in its role directory per preset, creating it if absent and overwriting only when known stale patterns are present, otherwise preserving it — the safe install path for session startup.

classes.name: NudgeSessionWithOpts
classes.signature: func (t *Tmux) NudgeSessionWithOpts(session, message string, opts NudgeOpts) error
classes.description_zh: 向目标 tmux 会话/代理 pane 注入一条消息:用跨进程 flock 与进程内锁串行化,处理 copy/Rewind 模式、Escape 时序与 Enter 校验,再唤醒分离 pane,是向代理投递提示的核心机制。
classes.description_en: Delivers a message into a target tmux session's agent pane — serialized via cross-process flock and in-process locks, handling copy/Rewind modes, Escape timing, and Enter verification before waking detached panes — the core mechanism for nudging agents.

classes.name: CollectDatabaseOwners
classes.description_zh: 汇集所有 Dolt 数据库名到其所有者(town beads/各 rig beads)的映射,数据来源为 town .beads、rigs.json 与 routes.jsonl。
classes.description_en: Builds a map from each Dolt database name to its owner (town beads or a specific rig's beads), drawing from the town .beads dir, rigs.json, and routes.jsonl.

classes.name: Start
classes.description_zh: 启动本镇的 Dolt SQL 服务器:用 flock 防并发启动(按数据库数自适应退避),准备 daemon 目录并以组装好的配置拉起 sql-server 进程,是 beads ledger 的核心引导。
classes.description_en: Starts the town's Dolt SQL server — guarding against concurrent starts with a flock (backoff scaled by database count), preparing the daemon directory, and launching the sql-server process from the assembled config — the core bootstrap of the beads ledger.

classes.name: IsRunning
classes.description_zh: 判定本镇 Dolt 服务器是否在运行:综合 sql-server.info、PID 文件、端口占用与 TCP 可达性多重探测,并清理陈旧 PID 文件,返回 (running, pid)。
classes.description_en: Determines whether the town's Dolt server is running by cross-checking sql-server.info, the PID file, port occupancy, and TCP reachability while cleaning stale PID files, returning (running, pid).

classes.name: GetHealthMetrics
classes.description_zh: 采集 Dolt 服务器健康指标:查询延迟、连接数占比、磁盘占用、只读探测与最近提交新鲜度,汇总为带告警的 HealthMetrics。
classes.description_en: Collects Dolt server health metrics — query latency, connection-count percentage, disk usage, a read-only probe, and last-commit freshness — aggregated into a HealthMetrics with warnings.

classes.name: AssembleCharacterSheet
classes.signature: func AssembleCharacterSheet(store WLCommonsStore, handle string) (*CharacterSheet, error)
classes.description_zh: 从 WL commons store 查询某 handle 的印章与徽章,组装出声誉档案 CharacterSheet(印章几何、技能覆盖、Top 印章、警告、层级),供各渲染器消费。
classes.description_en: Queries a handle's stamps and badges from the WL commons store and assembles a reputation CharacterSheet (stamp geometry, skill coverage, top stamps, warnings, tier) consumed by the format renderers.

classes.name: EnsureAllMetadata
classes.description_zh: 为镇内每个 Dolt 数据库批量校正 .beads/metadata.json:合并 routes.jsonl 与 rigs.json 的前缀映射、按 rig 分组并择一有效库名,避免重复库造成的 metadata 抖动。
classes.description_en: Repairs .beads/metadata.json for every Dolt database in the town by merging routes.jsonl and rigs.json prefix maps, grouping candidates per rig and picking one effective DB name to avoid metadata oscillation from duplicate databases.

classes.name: CheckUncommittedWork
classes.description_zh: 综合检查工作区是否有未提交工作:汇总 git status 脏文件、stash 数量与未推送提交,产出 UncommittedWorkStatus,用于 worktree 收尾前的安全校验。
classes.description_en: Performs a comprehensive check for uncommitted work, aggregating dirty files from git status, stash count, and unpushed commits into an UncommittedWorkStatus used to guard worktree teardown.

classes.name: CurrentBranch
classes.description_zh: 通过 git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 返回工作目录当前所在的分支名。
classes.description_en: Returns the working directory's current branch name via git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD.

classes.name: MigrateRigFromBeads
classes.signature: func MigrateRigFromBeads(townRoot, rigName, sourcePath string) error
classes.description_zh: 将某 rig 旧式 .beads/dolt 下的 Dolt 数据库目录移动到集中的 .dolt-data/<rig> 布局(含跨文件系统回退),迁移后更新 metadata.json。
classes.description_en: Migrates a rig's Dolt database directory from the legacy .beads/dolt layout into the centralized .dolt-data/<rig> layout (with cross-filesystem fallback), updating metadata.json afterward.

classes.name: SaveBase
classes.description_zh: 将基础 hooks 配置写入主 .gt 目录($GT_HOME/.gt 或 ~/.gt),持久化所有目标共享的 hooks 基线。
classes.description_en: Persists the base hooks configuration to the primary .gt directory ($GT_HOME/.gt or ~/.gt), storing the hooks baseline shared by all targets.

classes.name: EnsureMetadata
classes.signature: func EnsureMetadata(townRoot, rigName string, doltDatabase ...string) error
classes.description_zh: 确保某 rig 的 .beads/metadata.json 含正确的 Dolt 服务器配置:先原子解析/创建 beads 目录,再委托 EnsureMetadataForBeadsDir 写入。
classes.description_en: Ensures a rig's .beads/metadata.json carries the correct Dolt server config by atomically resolving/creating the beads dir, then delegating the write to EnsureMetadataForBeadsDir.

classes.name: LoadSettings
classes.description_zh: 读取并解析某个 .claude/settings.json 文件(保留未知字段),文件不存在时返回零值 SettingsJSON,损坏时报完整性错误。
classes.description_en: Reads and parses a .claude/settings.json file while preserving unknown fields, returning a zero-value SettingsJSON if absent and an integrity error if corrupt.

classes.name: PruneStaleBranches
classes.signature: func (g *Git) PruneStaleBranches(pattern string, dryRun bool) ([]PrunedBranch, error)
classes.description_zh: 查找并安全删除匹配模式(默认 polecat/*)且已合并或远端跟踪分支已消失的陈旧本地分支,用 git branch -d 保证只删已合并者,绝不动当前/默认分支。
classes.description_en: Finds and safely deletes stale local branches matching a pattern (default polecat/*) that are either merged or whose remote tracking branch is gone, using git branch -d to delete only merged branches and never touching the current or default branch.

classes.name: EnsureMetadataForBeadsDir
classes.signature: func EnsureMetadataForBeadsDir(townRoot, beadsDir, rigName string, doltDatabase ...string) error
classes.description_zh: 在已知 beads 目录中写入/更新 metadata.json(仅写本地配置、不依赖服务器或数据库),用 per-path 互斥锁串行化并保留已有额外字段,使部分初始化失败后仍能留下可恢复的 rig。
classes.description_en: Writes or updates metadata.json in a known beads directory (local config only, requiring neither server nor database), serializing via a per-path mutex and preserving existing extra fields so a recoverable rig survives partial init failures.

classes.name: Commit
classes.description_zh: 用给定消息对已暂存的更改执行 git commit。
classes.description_en: Runs git commit on the staged changes with the given message.

classes.name: Checkout
classes.description_zh: 在工作目录中检出指定 ref(git checkout),用于切换 worktree 到目标分支或提交。
classes.description_en: Checks out the given ref in the working directory (git checkout), used to switch a worktree to a target branch or commit.

classes.name: FindBrokenWorkspaces
classes.description_zh: 对照运行中服务器实际提供的数据库,检查 town(hq)与各 rig 的 beads 工作区是否完好,列出损坏工作区并在无法核验数据库时给出告警。
classes.description_en: Checks the town (hq) and per-rig beads workspaces against the databases actually served by the running server, listing broken workspaces and emitting a warning when databases cannot be verified.

classes.name: Rev
classes.description_zh: 通过 git rev-parse 将给定 ref 解析为其对应的提交哈希。
classes.description_en: Resolves the given ref to its commit hash via git rev-parse.

classes.name: Acquire
classes.description_zh: 获取该 worker 的身份锁:用 OS 级 flock 防 TOCTOU 竞争,自动清理陈旧锁,本进程已持有则刷新,被他人占用则返回 ErrLocked,并原子(temp+rename)写入锁文件。
classes.description_en: Acquires the worker's identity lock — using an OS-level flock to prevent TOCTOU races, auto-cleaning stale locks, refreshing if already held by this process and returning ErrLocked if held by another — then atomically (temp+rename) writes the lock file.

classes.name: SyncDatabases
classes.description_zh: 遍历全部(或经过滤的)Dolt 数据库,跳过 .no-sync 库,必要时自动配置 DoltHub remote,提交工作集并推送到 origin,从不快速失败而是收集每个库的结果。
classes.description_en: Iterates all (or a filtered subset of) Dolt databases, skipping .no-sync ones, auto-configuring a DoltHub remote when needed, committing the working set and pushing to origin — never failing fast but collecting a SyncResult per database.

classes.name: RefExists
classes.description_zh: 判定某 ref 是否存在:完全限定 ref 用 show-ref --verify,短 ref(如 origin/main)回退到 rev-parse --verify,并将"缺失"与真正错误区分开。
classes.description_en: Checks whether a ref exists, using show-ref --verify for fully-qualified refs and falling back to rev-parse --verify for short refs (e.g. origin/main), distinguishing a missing ref from a genuine error.

classes.name: MergeHooks
classes.signature: func MergeHooks(base *HooksConfig, overrides map[string]*HooksConfig, target string) *HooksConfig

classes.name: WorktreeAddFromRef
classes.signature: func (g *Git) WorktreeAddFromRef(path, branch, startPoint string) error

classes.name: WaitForIdle
classes.signature: func (t *Tmux) WaitForIdle(session string, timeout time.Duration) error

classes.name: VerifyPushedCommit
classes.signature: func (g *Git) VerifyPushedCommit(remote, branch, commit string) error

classes.name: ForensicScore
classes.signature: func ForensicScore(eventType string, age, ttl time.Duration) float64

classes.name: PurgeClosedEphemerals
classes.signature: func PurgeClosedEphemerals(townRoot, dbName string, dryRun bool) (int, error)

classes.name: PushSubmoduleCommit
classes.signature: func (g *Git) PushSubmoduleCommit(submodulePath, sha, remote string) error

classes.name: DeleteBranch
classes.signature: func (g *Git) DeleteBranch(name string, force bool) error

classes.name: MigrateAgentBeadsToWisps
classes.signature: func MigrateAgentBeadsToWisps(townRoot, workDir string, dryRun bool) (*MigrateWispsResult, error)

classes.name: SetupDoltHubRemote
classes.signature: func SetupDoltHubRemote(dbDir, org, dbName, token string) error

classes.name: CleanupOrphanedSessions
classes.signature: func (t *Tmux) CleanupOrphanedSessions(isGTSession func(string) bool) (cleaned int, err error)

classes.name: NewSessionWithCommandAndEnv
classes.signature: func (t *Tmux) NewSessionWithCommandAndEnv(name, workDir, command string, env map[string]string) error

classes.name: EnsureSessionFreshWithCommand
classes.signature: func (t *Tmux) EnsureSessionFreshWithCommand(name, workDir, command string) error

classes.name: WorktreeRemove
classes.signature: func (g *Git) WorktreeRemove(path string, force bool) error

classes.name: EnsureRigIssuePrefix
classes.signature: func EnsureRigIssuePrefix(townRoot, rigName string, serverMode bool) error

classes.name: NewSessionWithCommand
classes.signature: func (t *Tmux) NewSessionWithCommand(name, workDir, command string) error

classes.name: SendKeysDebounced
classes.signature: func (t *Tmux) SendKeysDebounced(session, keys string, debounceMs int) (retErr error)

classes.name: PortHolder
classes.signature: func PortHolder(port int) (pid int, dataDir string)

classes.name: AutoPrune
classes.signature: func AutoPrune(townRoot string, config *Config) (result *PruneResult, ran bool, err error)

classes.name: ConfigureGasTownSession
classes.signature: func (t *Tmux) ConfigureGasTownSession(session string, theme *Theme, rig, worker, role string) error

classes.name: CapturePane
classes.signature: func (t *Tmux) CapturePane(session string, lines int) (string, error)

classes.name: CapturePaneLines
classes.signature: func (t *Tmux) CapturePaneLines(session string, lines int) ([]string, error)

classes.name: EnsureSessionFreshWithCommandAndEnv
classes.signature: func (t *Tmux) EnsureSessionFreshWithCommandAndEnv(name, workDir, command string, env map[string]string) error

classes.name: FindFromCwdWithFallback
classes.signature: func FindFromCwdWithFallback() (townRoot string, cwd string, err error)

classes.name: RespawnPaneWithWorkDir
classes.signature: func (t *Tmux) RespawnPaneWithWorkDir(pane, workDir, command string) error

classes.name: ComputeExpectedTemplate
classes.signature: func ComputeExpectedTemplate(provider, hooksFile, role string) ([]byte, error)

classes.name: cloneInternal
classes.signature: func (g *Git) cloneInternal(url, dest string, opts cloneOptions) error

layers.name: Foundation
layers.summary_zh: 配置、常量、事件、遥测与共享工具
layers.summary_en: config, constants, events, telemetry and shared utilities

classes.name: Render
classes.description_zh: 将 Table 的列与行渲染为 ANSI 对齐的字符串,是终端表格输出的核心格式化原语,供全局命令统一展示结构化列表。
classes.description_en: Renders a Table's columns and rows into an ANSI-aligned string, the core terminal-table formatting primitive shared by all commands for structured list output.

classes.name: BuildStartupCommandWithAgentOverride
classes.signature: func BuildStartupCommandWithAgentOverride(envVars map[string]string, rigPath, prompt, agentOverride string) (string, error)
classes.description_zh: 在 BuildStartupCommand 基础上支持显式 agentOverride 优先级,组装带环境变量、prompt 与解析后 agent 的会话启动命令行,是 agent 拉起的配置入口。
classes.description_en: Assembles an agent session startup command line (env vars, prompt, resolved agent) like BuildStartupCommand but honoring an explicit agentOverride priority, the config entry point for spawning agents.

classes.name: Set
classes.signature: func (c *Config) Set(key string, value interface{}) error
classes.description_zh: 向 .beads-wisp 本地配置(永不随 git 同步)写入键值,带读写锁与原子落盘,是瞬态/本地 rig 设置的持久化原语。
classes.description_en: Writes a key/value into the git-unsynced .beads-wisp local config with locking and atomic save, the persistence primitive for transient per-rig settings.

classes.name: AgentEnv
classes.description_zh: 依据角色(mayor/witness/polecat 等)生成 agent 进程的全套环境变量(GT_ROLE、BD_ACTOR、OTEL 资源属性等),是 agent 环境变量的唯一真源。
classes.description_en: Builds the complete environment-variable map for an agent process keyed by role (GT_ROLE, BD_ACTOR, OTEL resource attrs, etc.), the single source of truth for agent env vars.

classes.name: LoadRigsConfig
classes.description_zh: 从磁盘读取并校验 rigs 注册表(rigs.json),含针对并发非原子写的重试容错,是 rig 清单的加载原语。
classes.description_en: Reads and validates the rigs registry (rigs.json) from disk with retry tolerance for concurrent non-atomic writers, the loading primitive for the rig inventory.

classes.name: BuildStartupCommand
classes.signature: func BuildStartupCommand(envVars map[string]string, rigPath, prompt string) string
classes.description_zh: 根据 envVars 中的角色(GT_ROLE/GT_CREW)做基于角色或按 worker 的 agent 解析,组装会话启动命令行,是 agent 拉起的默认配置入口。
classes.description_en: Performs role-based or per-worker agent resolution from envVars (GT_ROLE/GT_CREW) and assembles the session startup command line, the default config entry point for spawning agents.

classes.name: PrintWarning
classes.description_zh: 以统一样式将警告消息打印到 stderr(避免污染 stdout 的结构化输出),是全局警告输出的基础原语。
classes.description_en: Prints a consistently-styled warning to stderr (keeping it off stdout's structured output), the foundational primitive for warning messages across the CLI.

classes.name: LoadRigSettings
classes.description_zh: 加载并校验单个 rig 的 settings 文件,并对已废弃的 merge_queue 键发出提示警告,是 rig 级配置的读取原语。
classes.description_en: Loads and validates a single rig's settings file and advisorily warns on deprecated merge_queue keys, the read primitive for rig-level configuration.

classes.name: SaveRigSettings
classes.description_zh: 校验后将 RigSettings 序列化写入磁盘,是 rig 级配置的持久化原语。
classes.description_en: Validates then serializes and writes RigSettings to disk, the persistence primitive for rig-level configuration.

classes.name: TownSettingsPath
classes.description_zh: 由 townRoot 拼出 town 级 settings/config.json 的规范路径,是 town 配置定位的路径原语。
classes.description_en: Derives the canonical path to town-level settings/config.json from townRoot, the path primitive for locating town configuration.

classes.name: ResolveWorkerAgentConfig
classes.description_zh: 按 rig worker_agents → town crew_agents → crew 角色默认的三级优先级解析具名 crew 成员的 RuntimeConfig,是按 worker 选型的配置解析器。
classes.description_en: Resolves a named crew worker's RuntimeConfig through a three-tier priority (rig worker_agents → town crew_agents → crew role default), the config resolver for per-worker agent selection.

classes.name: ResolveRoleAgentConfig
classes.description_zh: 为某角色(mayor/witness/polecat 等)解析对应的 RuntimeConfig 并附加角色 effort 设置,是按角色选型 agent 的核心配置解析器。
classes.description_en: Resolves the RuntimeConfig for a given role (mayor/witness/polecat, etc.) and attaches role effort settings, the core config resolver for per-role agent selection.

classes.name: GetAgentPresetByName
classes.description_zh: 按字符串名从全局 agent 注册表查找内置/自定义 preset 信息,未命中返回 nil,是 agent preset 的查表原语。
classes.description_en: Looks up built-in/custom agent preset info from the global registry by string name, returning nil on miss, the lookup primitive for agent presets.

classes.name: LoadOrCreateTownSettings
classes.description_zh: 加载 town 级 settings,文件缺失时返回带默认值的新 TownSettings,是 town 配置容错读取的原语。
classes.description_en: Loads town-level settings, returning fresh defaulted TownSettings when the file is missing, the fault-tolerant read primitive for town configuration.

classes.name: SaveTownSettings
classes.description_zh: 校验类型与版本后将 TownSettings 序列化写入磁盘,是 town 级配置的持久化原语。
classes.description_en: Validates type and version then serializes and writes TownSettings to disk, the persistence primitive for town-level configuration.

classes.name: NewRigSettings
classes.description_zh: 构造带默认 merge_queue 与 namepool 的 RigSettings 实例,是 rig 级配置的默认值工厂。
classes.description_en: Constructs a RigSettings instance seeded with default merge_queue and namepool, the defaults factory for rig-level configuration.

classes.name: SaveRigsConfig
classes.description_zh: 校验后以临时文件+rename 的原子写方式落盘 rigs 注册表,确保并发读者不会看到半写文件,是 rig 清单的持久化原语。
classes.description_en: Validates then atomically writes the rigs registry via temp-file-and-rename so concurrent readers never see a partial file, the persistence primitive for the rig inventory.

classes.name: SetIndent
classes.description_zh: 设置表格整体的左缩进并链式返回 Table,是表格渲染原语的配置项之一。
classes.description_en: Sets the table's left indent and returns the Table for chaining, a configuration option of the table-rendering primitive.

classes.name: NewTownSettings
classes.description_zh: 构造带默认 agent(claude)及空 agents/role_agents 映射的 TownSettings 实例,是 town 级配置的默认值工厂。
classes.description_en: Constructs a TownSettings instance with the default agent (claude) and empty agents/role_agents maps, the defaults factory for town-level configuration.

classes.name: LoadRoleDefinition
classes.signature: func LoadRoleDefinition(townRoot, rigPath, roleName string) (*RoleDefinition, error)
classes.description_zh: 按 内置默认→town 覆盖→rig 覆盖 的逐层合并解析角色定义(*.toml),是角色配置三级覆盖的加载原语。
classes.description_en: Resolves a role definition by layered merge of built-in defaults → town overrides → rig overrides (*.toml), the loading primitive for three-tier role configuration.

classes.name: ResolveAccountConfigDir
classes.signature: func ResolveAccountConfigDir(accountsPath, accountFlag string) (configDir, handle string, err error)
classes.description_zh: 按 GT_ACCOUNT 环境变量→--account 标志→默认账户 的优先级解析出 agent 凭据配置目录与 handle,是多账户切换的配置解析器。
classes.description_en: Resolves an agent's credential config dir and handle by priority (GT_ACCOUNT env → --account flag → default account), the config resolver for multi-account switching.

classes.name: LogFeed
classes.signature: func LogFeed(eventType, actor string, payload map[string]interface{}) error
classes.description_zh: 以 feed 可见性追加一条活动事件到 events 日志的便捷封装,是 gt 活动流事件发射的基础原语。
classes.description_en: A convenience wrapper that appends a feed-visible activity event to the events log, the foundational event-emission primitive for the gt activity feed.

classes.name: RecordBDCall
classes.signature: func RecordBDCall(ctx context.Context, args []string, durationMs float64, err error, stdout []byte, stderr string)
classes.description_zh: 记录一次 bd CLI 子进程调用的 OTEL 指标与日志事件(计数、时延直方图、按需采集 stdout/stderr),是 beads 调用可观测性的遥测原语。
classes.description_en: Records OTEL metrics and a log event for one bd CLI subprocess call (count, duration histogram, opt-in stdout/stderr capture), the telemetry primitive for beads-call observability.

classes.name: BuildCommandWithPrompt
classes.description_zh: 将 RuntimeConfig 渲染为带初始 prompt 的完整命令行(按 opencode/copilot/gemini/claude 等差异选择 flag 并做 shell 引用),是 agent 命令构建的核心方法。
classes.description_en: Renders a RuntimeConfig into a full command line with an initial prompt (selecting per-agent flags for opencode/copilot/gemini/claude and shell-quoting), the core method for building agent commands.

classes.name: ResolveProcessNames
classes.description_zh: 根据 agent 名、命令与参数(含 env/sudo 等 wrapper 拆解)解析出用于 pgrep 进程匹配的真实进程名列表,是进程发现的配置原语。
classes.description_en: Resolves the real process-name list used for pgrep matching from agent name, command and args (unwrapping env/sudo wrappers), the config primitive for process discovery.

classes.name: ApplyCostTier
classes.description_zh: 将某成本档(tier)的 agent、role_agents 与 effort 默认写入 TownSettings(仅改受档位管理的角色,保留自定义),是成本档配置应用的原语。
classes.description_en: Writes a cost tier's agent, role_agents and effort defaults into TownSettings (modifying only tier-managed roles while preserving custom ones), the primitive for applying cost-tier configuration.

classes.name: LoadAgentRegistry
classes.description_zh: 从 JSON 文件加载 agent 定义并与内置 preset 合并(用户定义覆盖同名内置),是 agent 注册表的加载原语。
classes.description_en: Loads agent definitions from a JSON file and merges them with built-in presets (user definitions override same-named built-ins), the loading primitive for the agent registry.

classes.name: RuntimeConfigFromPreset
classes.description_zh: 由具名 agent preset 构造对应的 RuntimeConfig(Command/Args/Env),是 preset 到运行时配置的转换原语。
classes.description_en: Constructs a RuntimeConfig (Command/Args/Env) from a named agent preset, the conversion primitive from preset to runtime config.

classes.name: LoadAccountsConfig
classes.description_zh: 加载并校验多账户配置文件(accounts.json),是 agent 凭据账户清单的读取原语。
classes.description_en: Loads and validates the multi-account configuration file (accounts.json), the read primitive for the agent-credential accounts inventory.

classes.name: ResolveAgentConfigWithOverride
classes.signature: func ResolveAgentConfigWithOverride(townRoot, rigPath, agentOverride string) (*RuntimeConfig, string, error)
classes.description_zh: 在持有解析锁下,带可选 override 解析某 rig 的 agent RuntimeConfig 并返回所选 agent 名,是带覆盖的 agent 选型配置解析器。
classes.description_en: Resolves a rig's agent RuntimeConfig with an optional override (under the resolve lock) and returns the chosen agent name, the config resolver for override-aware agent selection.

classes.name: GetRigPrefix
classes.description_zh: 从 rigs.json 读取某 rig 的 beads 前缀(去除尾部连字符),查无则回退 "gt",是 rig→beads 前缀映射的查表原语。
classes.description_en: Reads a rig's beads prefix from rigs.json (stripping a trailing hyphen) and falls back to "gt" on miss, the lookup primitive mapping a rig to its beads prefix.

classes.name: CreatePolecatCLAUDEmd
classes.signature: func CreatePolecatCLAUDEmd(worktreePath, rigName, polecatName string) (bool, error)
classes.description_zh: 将内置 polecat CLAUDE.md 模板做 rig/name 替换后写入工作树(若已有受跟踪 CLAUDE.md 则改写 CLAUDE.local.md 以免污染 PR diff),是 polecat 生命周期指令落地的模板原语。
classes.description_en: Substitutes rig/name into the embedded polecat CLAUDE.md template and writes it to the worktree (diverting to CLAUDE.local.md when a tracked CLAUDE.md exists to avoid polluting the PR diff), the template primitive for materializing polecat lifecycle instructions.

classes.name: LoadOperationalConfig
classes.description_zh: 从 town 设置中提取 OperationalConfig(超时/心跳等运行阈值),永不返回 nil 或报错,是运行参数配置的容错读取原语。
classes.description_en: Extracts OperationalConfig (timeouts/heartbeat and other runtime thresholds) from town settings, never returning nil or erroring, the fault-tolerant read primitive for operational tuning.

classes.name: ExpandHome
classes.description_zh: 将路径前导的 ~/ 展开为缓存的用户家目录,是路径处理的共享工具原语。
classes.description_en: Expands a leading ~/ in a path to the cached user home directory, a shared utility primitive for path handling.

classes.name: Block
classes.description_zh: 把某键标记为 blocked(从 values 移除并加入 blocked 列表,使 Get 返回 nil 且 Set 失效),是 wisp 本地配置的禁用原语。
classes.description_en: Marks a key as blocked (removing it from values and adding it to the blocked list so Get returns nil and Set is suppressed), the disable primitive for wisp local config.

classes.name: GetAgentPreset
classes.description_zh: 按 AgentPreset 枚举从全局 agent 注册表查找 preset 信息,未命中返回 nil,是 agent preset 的强类型查表原语。
classes.description_en: Looks up preset info from the global agent registry by AgentPreset enum, returning nil on miss, the typed lookup primitive for agent presets.

classes.name: Duration
classes.description_zh: 封装 time.Duration 并实现 TextUnmarshaler 以支持 TOML 字符串解析(如 "5m"),是角色配置中时长字段的序列化原语。
classes.description_en: Wraps time.Duration with a TextUnmarshaler so TOML string forms (e.g. "5m") parse, the serialization primitive for duration fields in role configuration.

classes.name: RecordMailMessage
classes.signature: func RecordMailMessage(ctx context.Context, operation string, msg MailMessageInfo, err error)
classes.description_zh: 记录一次邮件发送/读取/归档操作的 OTEL 指标与日志事件(正文需 GT_LOG_MAIL_BODY 显式开启),是 agent 间消息系统可观测性的遥测原语。
classes.description_en: Records OTEL metrics and a log event for a mail send/read/archive operation (body opt-in via GT_LOG_MAIL_BODY), the telemetry primitive for inter-agent messaging observability.

classes.name: DefaultRuntimeConfig
classes.description_zh: 返回以 claude 为 provider 并经规范化的默认 RuntimeConfig,是 agent 运行时配置的兜底默认值工厂。
classes.description_en: Returns a normalized default RuntimeConfig with claude as provider, the fallback defaults factory for agent runtime configuration.

classes.name: PrependEnv
classes.signature: func PrependEnv(command string, envVars map[string]string) string
classes.description_zh: 将环境变量以 export 语句(Windows 用 $env: 语法)经 shell 引用后前置到命令字符串,是会话启动命令注入环境的拼装原语。
classes.description_en: Prepends environment variables as shell-quoted export statements (PowerShell $env: syntax on Windows) onto a command string, the assembly primitive for injecting env into startup commands.

layer_groups.name: Interfaces
layer_groups.summary_zh: 面向用户的两个并列前端:CLI 命令与监控面板
layer_groups.summary_en: the two parallel user-facing front-ends: CLI commands and the monitoring dashboard

flows.name_en: Sling: dispatch work to a worker
flows.description_zh: `gt sling` 把一个 bead 指派给某 rig,并生成一个 polecat 工人代理来执行。
flows.description_en: `gt sling` assigns a bead to a rig and spawns a polecat worker agent to execute it.

steps.label_zh: 校验跨 rig 守卫并加派工锁

flows.description_zh: 为一个任务分配身份、创建 git worktree 钩子、启动 tmux 会话并注入角色启动提示。
flows.description_en: Allocate an identity, create the git-worktree hook, start a tmux session and inject the role startup prompt.

flows.description_zh: Bors 式合并队列:批量收集 MR、构建重基栈、跑门禁,通过则落地,失败则二分隔离。
flows.description_en: Bors-style merge queue: batch MRs, build a rebase stack, run gates, land on green and bisect to isolate failures.

flows.description_zh: 后台守护进程组装各子系统:拉起 Dolt 服务、convoy 管理器、活动馆长,然后进入跨 rig 巡逻循环。
flows.description_en: The background daemon wires up subsystems — Dolt server, convoy manager, feed curator — then enters the cross-rig patrol loop.

flows.description_zh: `gt convoy create` 解析 bead 列表、创建 convoy bead 并登记关联 issue,作为跨代理的工作跟踪单元。
flows.description_en: `gt convoy create` resolves bead IDs, creates the convoy bead and registers its issues as a cross-agent work-tracking unit.

flows.description_zh: 每个 rig 的 Witness 巡逻 polecat,探测僵尸/停滞会话,甄别完成的工作并触发恢复或回收。
flows.description_en: Each rig's Witness patrols its polecats, detecting zombie/stalled sessions, triaging completed work and triggering recovery or reaping.

flows.description_zh: `gt doctor` 组装 rig 与工作区的检查项,逐项执行并把结果渲染成带图标的报告。
flows.description_en: `gt doctor` assembles rig + workspace checks, runs each one and renders the results into an iconified report.

flows.description_zh: htmx 仪表盘的 API 处理器把请求路由到命令、邮件、issue 与 convoy 面板,返回 HTML 片段。
flows.description_en: The htmx dashboard's API handler routes requests to commands, mail, issues and the convoy panel, returning HTML fragments.

flows.description_zh: Mayor 启动 ACP 代理与推进器,转发协调者会话与 AI 运行时之间的 Agent Client Protocol 消息。
flows.description_en: The Mayor starts its ACP proxy and propeller, forwarding Agent Client Protocol messages between the coordinator session and the AI runtime.
